let step (l : List ℕ) : ℕ := (l.foldr max 2 + 1) * (l.foldr (fun x acc => (2^x - 3) * acc) 1).totient
  let seq : ℕ → List ℕ := Nat.rec [] (fun _ l => step l :: l)
  let f (n : ℕ) : ℕ := step (seq n)
  have h_cons : ∀ n, seq (n + 1) = f n :: seq n := fun _ => rfl
  have h_inv : ∀ n, (∀ x ∈ seq n, 3 ≤ x ∧ x < f n) ∧ 3 ≤ f n := by
    intro n; induction' n with n ih
    · simp [seq, f, step, Nat.totient_one]; norm_num
    · obtain ⟨h_prev, h_f_curr⟩ := ih
      have h_f_next : 3 ≤ f (n + 1) := by
        dsimp [f, step]; refine Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ (Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero ?_))
        rw [ne_eq, List.foldr_eq_zero_iff]; push_neg; rintro x hx; rw [List.mem_cons] at hx
        rcases hx with rfl | hx
        · linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2) h_f_curr]
        · linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2) ((h_prev x hx).1)]
        apply Nat.le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)
      refine ⟨fun x hx => ?_, h_f_next⟩; rw [h_cons, List.mem_cons] at hx; rcases hx with rfl | hx
      · refine ⟨h_f_curr, ?_⟩; dsimp [f, step]; rw [h_cons]
        apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_le (Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_max_left _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ _)
        apply Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero _); rw [ne_eq, List.foldr_eq_zero_iff]; push_neg; rintro y hy
        rw [List.mem_cons] at hy; rcases hy with rfl | hy
        · linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2) h_f_curr]
        · linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2) ((h_prev y hy).1)]
      · exact ⟨(h_prev x hx).1, lt_trans (h_prev x hx).2 (by 
          rw [h_cons]; dsimp [f, step]
          apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_le (Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_max_right _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ _)
          apply Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero _); rw [ne_eq, List.foldr_eq_zero_iff]; push_neg; rintro y hy
          rw [List.mem_cons] at hy; rcases hy with rfl | hy
          · linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2) h_f_curr]
          · linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num : 0 < 2) ((h_prev y hy).1)])⟩
  let F (n : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨f n, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith [(h_inv n).2])⟩
  refine ⟨Set.range F, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective; intro i j hij; wlog h : i < j generalizing i j
    · cases' lt_or_eq_of_le (le_of_not_lt h) with hji heq
      · exact (this j i hij.symm hji).symm
      · exact heq
    · have : f i < f j := by
        induction' j with j IH
        · contradiction
        · cases' eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ h) with heq hlt
          · subst heq; exact (h_inv (i + 1)).1 (f i) (by rw [h_cons]; left; rfl) |>.2
          · exact lt_trans (IH hlt) ((h_inv (j + 1)).1 (f j) (by rw [h_cons]; left; rfl) |>.2)
      exact (ne_of_lt this) hij
  · intro a b ha hb hab; obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := ha; obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := hb; wlog h : i < j generalizing i j
    · exact (this j i hab.symm h).symm
    rw [Nat.coprime_of_dvd']; intro k k_dvd k_dvd_val
    have k_odd : Odd k := by
       by_contra keven; rw [← Nat.even_iff_not_odd] at keven
       have : 2 ∣ 2 ^ f i - 3 := dvd_trans keven k_dvd_val
       have : Odd (2 ^ f i - 3) := Nat.odd_sub (by norm_num) (Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨Nat.even_two, by linarith [(h_inv i).2]⟩)
       rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at this; contradiction
    have k_dvd_prod : k ∣ (seq j).foldr (fun x acc => (2^x - 3) * acc) 1 := by

    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_two k_div_two k_odd

let next (l : List ℕ) : ℕ :=
    match l.getLast? with
    | none => 3
    | some last => (last + 1) * Nat.totient ((l.map (fun x => 2^x - 3)).prod)
  let s_list (n : ℕ) : List ℕ := n.rec [] (fun _ l => l ++ [next l])
  let f (n : ℕ) : ℕ := (s_list (n + 1)).getLast (by simp [s_list])
  have h_map : ∀ n, s_list n = (List.range n).map f := by
    intro n; induction n with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ n ih => simp [s_list, List.range_succ, ih, f, List.getLast_append]
  have h_step : ∀ n, f (n + 1) = (f n + 1) * Nat.totient ((List.range (n + 1)).map (fun i => 2^(f i) - 3)).prod := by
    intro n
    have : (s_list (n + 1)).getLast? = some (f n) := by rw [h_map, List.getLast?_map, List.getLast?_range]; simp
    dsimp [f, s_list]; rw [List.getLast_append, next, this, h_map]
  have h_ge_3 : ∀ n, f n ≥ 3 := by
    intro n; induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    match n with
    | 0 => dsimp [f, s_list, next]; rfl
    | k+1 =>
      rw [h_step]
      have : 0 < ((List.range (k + 1)).map (fun i => 2^(f i) - 3)).prod := 
        List.prod_pos fun _ h ↦ let ⟨i, _, rfl⟩ := List.mem_map.1 h
          have := ih i (by omega); by linarith [one_lt_pow' rfl (by omega : 3 ≤ f i)]
      have : 0 < Nat.totient _ := Nat.totient_pos.2 this
      linarith [ih k (by omega)]
  have h_mono : StrictMono f := by
    apply StrictMono.nat; intro n; rw [h_step]
    have : 0 < Nat.totient _ := Nat.totient_pos.2 <| List.prod_pos fun _ h ↦ 
       let ⟨i, _, rfl⟩ := List.mem_map.1 h; by linarith [one_lt_pow' rfl (h_ge_3 i)]
    linarith
  refine ⟨Set.range (fun n => ⟨f n, by linarith [h_ge_3 n]⟩), ?_⟩
  constructor
  · rw [Set.infinite_range_iff]; exact h_mono.injective
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]; intros m n hmn
    wlog h : m < n generalizing m n; · exact (this n m hmn.symm h).symm
    have : n = (n - 1) + 1 := by omega
    rw [this, h_step]; set P := ((List.range n).map (fun i => 2^(f i) - 3)).prod
    have dvd_P : (2^(f m) - 3) ∣ P := List.dvd_prod (List.mem_map_of_mem _ (List.mem_range.2 h))
    have P_odd : Odd P := List.prod_map_odd.2 fun i _ ↦ by
       rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Even, ←Nat.dvd_add_iff_left ⟨1, by omega⟩]
       simp [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge_3 i)]
       exact Nat.not_dvd_of_pos_of_lt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
    apply Nat.gcd_eq_one_iff_coprime.2
    rw [Nat.gcd_rec, ← Nat.ModEq.gcd_eq_of_modEq_left]
    · rw [Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.gcd_eq_right]
      · exact (Nat.coprime_two_right _).2 (by
          rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Even, ←Nat.dvd_add_iff_left ⟨1, by omega⟩]
          simp [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge_3 m)]
          exact Nat.not_dvd_of_pos_of_lt (by norm_num) (by norm_num))
      · have : 2^(f m) - 3 ≥ 5 := by linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge_3 m)]
        simp; omega
    · have : 2^(f n) ≡ 1 [MOD P] := by
         rw [this, h_step, pow_mul]; apply Nat.ModEq.pow_eq_one_of_modEq; apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient
         exact (Nat.coprime_two_right P).2 P_odd
      apply Nat.ModEq.of_dvd dvd_P at this
      have mod_eq : 2^(f n) = (2^(f n) / (2^(f m) - 3)) * (2^(f m) - 3) + 1 := Nat.div_add_mod_of_modEq_lt_dividend this 
        (by apply one_lt_pow' rfl; apply StrictMono.lt h_mono h)
      rw [mod_eq]; apply Nat.ModEq.sub_right (by linarith)
      apply Nat.ModEq.add_right 1; rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith)]
      convert Nat.modEq_zero_iff_dvd.2 (dvd_mul_left _ _)
      rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc (by linarith), Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
      rw [Nat.modEq_iff_dvd]; use (2^(f n) / (2^(f m) - 3) - 1)
      have : 2^(f n) / (2^(f m) - 3) ≥ 1 := Nat.div_pos (by 
           apply Nat.le_of_lt; apply StrictMono.lt h_mono h) (by linarith [h_ge_3 m])
      simp [mul_sub]; omega

let L := Nat.rec (motive := fun _ ↦ ℕ) 5 (fun _ x ↦ x * (2 ^ x.factorial - 3))
  let f : ℕ → ℕ := fun n ↦ match n with | 0 => 3 | n + 1 => (L n).factorial
  have L_ge_5 : ∀ n, 5 ≤ L n := by
    intro n; induction n with | zero => decide | succ n ih =>
      dsimp [L]; apply Nat.le_trans ih
      apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right
      apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
      apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide)
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (Nat.factorial_le ih)
  have L_odd : ∀ n, Odd (L n) := by
    intro n; induction n with | zero => decide | succ n ih =>
      dsimp [L]; rw [Nat.odd_mul]; use ih
      rw [←Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub_of_le_of_even]
      · decide
      · refine Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_trans (by decide) (L_ge_5 n)) ?_
        apply Nat.le_self_pow (by decide) (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.factorial_pos _))
      · rw [Nat.even_pow]; simp [Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.factorial_pos _)]
  let s : ℕ → ℕ+ := fun n ↦ ⟨f n, by cases n <;> [decide; apply Nat.factorial_pos]⟩
  refine ⟨Set.range s, Set.infinite_range_of_injective (StrictMono.injective ?_), ?_⟩
  · apply strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ; intro n; cases n <;> dsimp [f, L]
    · exact Nat.factorial_le (L_ge_5 0)
    · apply Nat.factorial_lt
      apply Nat.lt_mul_of_pos_right _ (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide) 
        (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (Nat.factorial_le (L_ge_5 _)))))
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]; intro m n hne; wlog hmn : m < n
    · exact (this n m hne.symm (hne.symm.lt_or_lt.resolve_left hmn)).symm
    dsimp; apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (b := L (n-1))
    · intro k hk; induction n with | zero => contradiction | succ n ih =>
      cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hk)
      · subst k; dsimp [L]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_left
      · dsimp [L]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih ‹_›)
    · cases n with | zero => contradiction | succ n =>
      dsimp [f]; apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'; intro p pp hp
      have p_odd : p ≠ 2 := by
        intro h; rw [h] at hp; have := L_odd n; rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at this
        apply this; exact Nat.even_iff.2 hp
      have : p ∣ 2 := by
        have h1 : 2 ^ (L n).factorial ≡ 1 [MOD p] := by
           apply Nat.ModEq.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one p_odd
           apply Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by have := L_ge_5 n; linarith))
           apply Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (by have := L_ge_5 n; linarith) hp) p_odd)
        have h2 : 2 ^ (L n).factorial ≡ 3 [MOD p] := by
           rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_zero_iff_dvd.2 hp]; rfl
        trans 3; exact h1.symm; exact h2
      rw [Nat.dvd_prime Nat.prime_two] at this; exact p_odd this

let pigeonhole (n : ℕ) (f : Fin (n + 1) → Fin n) : ∃ i j, i ≠ j ∧ f i = f j := by
    apply Fintype.exists_ne_map_eq_of_card_lt; simp
  
  have exists_next (k : ℕ) (L : ℕ) (hL : L % 2 = 1) : ∃ n, n > k ∧ 2 ^ n ≡ 4 [MOD L] := by
    let f : Fin (L + 1) → Fin L := fun i ↦ ⟨2 ^ (i : ℕ) % L, Nat.mod_lt _ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; simp at hL))⟩
    obtain ⟨i, j, hij, heq⟩ := pigeonhole L f
    dsimp at heq; rw [Fin.mk_eq_mk] at heq
    wlog h_lt : (i : ℕ) < j
    · exact this k L hL j i hij.symm heq.symm (hij.symm.lt_or_lt.resolve_left h_lt)
    have h_mod : 2 ^ (i : ℕ) ≡ 2 ^ (j : ℕ) [MOD L] := heq
    have h_cop : Nat.Coprime 2 L := Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr hL
    have h_pow_cop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (i : ℕ)) L := Nat.coprime_pow_left _ h_cop
    have h_one : 2 ^ (j - i) ≡ 1 [MOD L] := by
      rw [← Nat.ModEq.cancel_left_of_coprime h_pow_cop]
      rw [← Nat.pow_add, Nat.add_sub_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt h_lt), mul_one]
      exact h_mod.symm
    let d := j - i
    have hd : d > 0 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt h_lt
    use 2 + (k + 1) * d
    constructor
    · calc 
       2 + (k + 1) * d > (k + 1) * d := by linarith
       _ ≥ (k + 1) * 1 := by gcongr; exact hd
       _ > k := by linarith
    · rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.pow_add]
      have : 2 ^ ((k + 1) * d) ≡ 1 [MOD L] := by
        rw [mul_comm, pow_mul]; convert Nat.ModEq.pow (k + 1) h_one; simp
      have h4 : 2 ^ 2 = 4 := rfl
      rw [h4]; exact Nat.ModEq.mul rfl this

  let next_n (k : ℕ) (L : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    if h : L % 2 = 1 then Classical.choose (exists_next k L h) else k + 1

  let rec seq_aux (n : ℕ) : List ℕ :=
    match n with
    | 0 => [3]
    | m + 1 =>
      let l := seq_aux m
      let L := (l.map (fun x ↦ 2 ^ x - 3)).prod
      (next_n l.head! L) :: l

  let seq (n : ℕ) : ℕ := (seq_aux n).head!

  have h_seq_eq (n : ℕ) : seq (n + 1) = next_n (seq n) ((seq_aux n).map (fun x ↦ 2 ^ x - 3)).prod := by
    simp [seq, seq_aux]

  have h_mem_aux (n m : ℕ) (h : m ≤ n) : seq m ∈ seq_aux n := by
    induction n with
    | zero => subst (Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero h); simp [seq_aux, seq]
    | succ n ih =>
      cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le h with
      | inl heq => subst heq; simp [seq, seq_aux]
      | inr hlt => simp [seq_aux]; right; exact ih (Nat.le_of_lt hlt)

  have main_prop (n : ℕ) : seq n ≥ 3 ∧ seq (n + 1) > seq n ∧ ((seq_aux n).map (fun x ↦ 2 ^ x - 3)).prod % 2 = 1 ∧ Nat.Coprime (2 ^ seq (n + 1) - 3) ((seq_aux n).map (fun x ↦ 2 ^ x - 3)).prod := by
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [seq, seq_aux]; have hL : 5 % 2 = 1 := rfl
      simp [next_n, hL]; set N := Classical.choose (exists_next 3 5 hL)
      have hN := Classical.choose_spec (exists_next 3 5 hL)
      refine ⟨le_rfl, hN.1, hL, ?_⟩
      rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
      have : (2 ^ N - 3) % 5 = 1 := by
         rw [← Nat.mod_add_div (2^N) 5, hN.2, Nat.add_sub_assoc (by norm_num), Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]; rfl
      rw [Nat.gcd_rec, this]; exact Nat.gcd_one_left _
    | succ n ih =>
      obtain ⟨h_ge3, h_inc, h_odd, h_cop⟩ := ih
      let L := ((seq_aux (n + 1)).map (fun x ↦ 2 ^ x - 3)).prod
      let L_prev := ((seq_aux n).map (fun x ↦ 2 ^ x - 3)).prod
      have hL_def : L = (2 ^ seq (n + 1) - 3) * L_prev := by
        simp [seq_aux, seq]; rw [mul_comm]
      have h_seq_n1_ge_4 : seq (n + 1) ≥ 4 := by linarith [h_inc, h_ge3]
      have h_term_odd : (2 ^ seq (n + 1) - 3) % 2 = 1 := by
        rw [← Nat.mod_add_div (2 ^ seq (n + 1)) 2, Nat.pow_mod_of_ne_zero _ (by linarith)]
        rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc (by norm_num), Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]; rfl
      have hL_odd : L % 2 = 1 := by rw [hL_def, Nat.mul_mod, h_odd, h_term_odd, mul_one]
      refine ⟨by linarith, ?_, hL_odd, ?_⟩
      · simp [h_seq_eq, next_n, hL_odd]
        exact (Classical.choose_spec (exists_next (seq (n + 1)) L hL_odd)).1
      · simp [h_seq_eq, next_n, hL_odd]; set next := Classical.choose _
        have h_next := Classical.choose_spec (exists_next (seq (n + 1)) L hL_odd)
        rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
        have h_mod : (2 ^ next - 3) % L = 1 := by
          rw [← Nat.mod_add_div (2^next) L, h_next.2, Nat.add_sub_assoc (by norm_num), Nat.add_mul_mod_self_left]; rfl
        rw [Nat.gcd_rec, h_mod]; exact Nat.gcd_one_left _

  use Set.range (fun n ↦ ⟨seq n, by linarith [(main_prop n).1]⟩)
  constructor
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h; wlog hnm : n < m
    · exact (this m n h.symm hnm.le.lt_or_lt.resolve_left hnm).symm
    · have : seq n < seq m := by
        induction m with
        | zero => contradiction
        | succ m ih =>
          cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt hnm) with
          | inl heq => subst heq; exact (main_prop m).2.1
          | inr hlt => exact Nat.lt_trans (ih hlt) (main_prop m).2.1
      rw [h] at this; exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _ this).elim
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]
    intro n m hne; wlog hnm : n < m
    · exact Nat.coprime_comm.mp (this m n hne.symm hnm.le.lt_or_lt.resolve_left hnm)
    · have h_factor : (2 ^ seq n - 3) ∣ ((seq_aux (m - 1)).map (fun x ↦ 2 ^ x - 3)).prod := by
        apply List.dvd_prod; apply List.mem_map_of_mem; apply h_mem_aux; exact Nat.le_pred_of_lt hnm
      have h_cop := (main_prop (m - 1)).2.2.2
      have h_eq : m = m - 1 + 1 := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; contradiction))
      rw [h_eq]; apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right h_factor h_cop

let P : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 (fun n p ↦ p * (2 ^ (if n = 0 then 3 else p.totient) - 3))
  have hP_odd : ∀ n, P n % 2 = 1 := by
    intro n; induction n with | zero => rfl | succ n ih =>
      rw [Nat.rec_add_one, Nat.mul_mod, ih, Nat.one_mul]
      rw [Nat.sub_mod, Nat.pow_mod]
      · norm_num; apply Nat.pow_mod_zero; norm_num
      · apply Nat.le_trans (m:=5); norm_num; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num)

        apply Nat.totient_le_totient_of_le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Nat.dvd_trans (by use 1; simp [P]) (by use 1; simp [P]))

    rcases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le hmn with rfl | hlt; · rfl
    have h_inc : ∀ k, f k < f (k + 1) := by

      · norm_num
      · norm_num; simp [P]; apply Nat.le_trans (m:=4); norm_num
        apply Nat.totient_le_totient_of_le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
      · simp [P]; apply Nat.totient_le_totient_of_le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
      · simp [P]; refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.totient_le_totient_of_le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)) ?_
        rw [Nat.totient_mul_of_coprime]; · apply Nat.ne_of_lt; apply Nat.lt_mul_of_pos_right (by norm_num)

          rw [Nat.coprime_comm, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.sub_mod, Nat.pow_mod, this]; norm_num; rfl
          · apply Nat.le_trans (m:=8); norm_num; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num)
            apply Nat.le_trans (m:=4); norm_num; apply Nat.totient_le_totient_of_le_of_dvd (by norm_num)

  · rintro _ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩ ⟨n, rfl⟩ hmn
    wlog hln : m < n; · exact (this n m hmn.symm (Ne.symm hmn) (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hln) (fun h => hmn (by rw [h])))).symm
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.sub_dvd_sub_exp (b:=3) (by norm_num) (by norm_num)) (by
       have : ∀ k l, k < l → P (k + 1) ∣ P l := by
         intro k l h; induction h with | refl => exact Nat.dvd_refl _
         | step _ ih => exact Nat.dvd_trans ih (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
