       apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd (Nat.dvd_refl _) (Nat.gcd_eq_one_of_coprime_of_dvd (by norm_num) (Nat.dvd_refl _) (hP_odd n)))
    rw [Nat.coprime_comm, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, Nat.sub_mod, Nat.pow_mod, this]; norm_num; rfl
    · apply Nat.le_trans (m:=8); norm_num; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num)
      apply Nat.le_trans (m:=4); norm_num; apply Nat.totient_le_totient_of_le_of_dvd (by norm_num)
      apply Nat.dvd_trans (by use 1; simp [P]) (by use 1; simp [P])

let step (x : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ :=
    let a := (x.1 + 1) * x.2.totient
    (a, x.2 * (2 ^ a - 3))
  let seq (n : ℕ) := (step^[n] (3, 5))
  let a (n : ℕ) := (seq n).1
  let p (n : ℕ) := (seq n).2
  have h_step (n : ℕ) : a (n + 1) = (a n + 1) * (p n).totient ∧ p (n + 1) = p n * (2 ^ a (n + 1) - 3) := by
    simp [a, p, seq, Function.iterate_succ_apply', step]
  have h_props (n : ℕ) : 3 ≤ a n ∧ Odd (p n) ∧ (∀ k < n + 1, (2 ^ a k - 3) ∣ p n) := by
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [a, p, seq]
      refine ⟨le_rfl, by decide, fun k hk ↦ by
        rw [Nat.lt_succ_iff, Nat.le_zero_iff] at hk; subst hk; simp⟩
    | succ n ih =>
      obtain ⟨ha, ho, hdvd⟩ := ih
      have hp_pos : 0 < p n := ho.pos
      have htot_pos : 0 < (p n).totient := Nat.totient_pos hp_pos
      obtain ⟨ha', hp'⟩ := h_step n
      rw [ha', hp']
      refine ⟨le_trans (Nat.le_succ _) (le_trans (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right htot_pos) (le_add_right _ _)), ho.mul (Nat.odd_sub.mpr ⟨Nat.even_pow.mpr ⟨Nat.ne_of_gt (by linarith), by decide⟩, by decide⟩), fun k hk ↦ ?_⟩
      rw [Nat.lt_succ_iff, Nat.le_succ_iff_eq_or_le] at hk
      rcases hk with rfl | hk
      · apply Nat.dvd_mul_left
      · apply Nat.dvd_mul_right _ (hdvd k (Nat.lt_succ_of_le hk))
  refine ⟨{ ⟨a n, by linarith [(h_props n).1]⟩ | n : ℕ }, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    wlog hnm : n < m
    · rcases Nat.lt_trichotomy n m with lt | rfl | gt; exacts [this n m h lt, rfl, (this m n h.symm gt).symm]
    · have : a n < a m := by
        induction m with | zero => contradiction | succ m ih =>
          cases Nat.lt_succ_iff_eq_or_le.mp hnm with
          | inl eq => subst eq; rw [(h_step n).1]; apply Nat.lt_mul_of_pos_right (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_odd_iff.mpr (h_props n).2.1))
          | inr le => apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (ih le); rw [(h_step m).1]; apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_odd_iff.mpr (h_props m).2.1))
      linarith
  · rintro ⟨_, an, rfl⟩ ⟨_, am, rfl⟩ hneq
    rw [Set.mem_range] at an am; rcases an with ⟨n, rfl⟩; rcases am with ⟨m, rfl⟩
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at hneq; wlog hnm : n < m
    · exact (this m n hneq.symm (hneq.symm.lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_not_lt hnm))).symm
    let L := p (m - 1); have hm : m = m - 1 + 1 := (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by rintro rfl; simp at hnm))).symm
    have hdvd_L : 2 ^ a n - 3 ∣ L := (h_props (m-1)).2.2 n (by rw [Nat.lt_succ_iff]; exact Nat.le_pred_of_lt hnm)
    have hcop : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ a m - 3) L := by
      rw [hm, (h_step (m-1)).1]
      have hmod : 2 ^ ((a (m-1) + 1) * L.totient) ≡ 1 [MOD L] := by
        rw [mul_comm, pow_mul]; exact (Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr (h_props (m-1)).2.1)).pow _
      apply Nat.dvd_one.mp; apply Nat.dvd_gcd (Nat.one_dvd _)
      intro g hgL hg; have : g ∣ 2 := by
        convert Nat.dvd_sub (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (le_trans (by norm_num) (h_props m).1)) (Nat.dvd_trans hgL (Nat.modeq_iff_dvd.mp hmod.symm)) hg
        norm_num
      cases Nat.dvd_prime Nat.prime_two this with | inl h1 => exact h1 | inr h2 => rw [h2, Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at hgL; exfalso; apply hgL (h_props (m-1)).2.1
    exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left hdvd_L hcop.symm

let step (vp : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ := (vp.1 * vp.2.totient, vp.2 * (2 ^ (vp.1 * vp.2.totient) - 3))
  let seq (n : ℕ) := step^[n] (3, 5)
  have h_seq : ∀ n, (seq n).2 % 2 = 1 ∧ (seq n).1 ≥ 3 ∧ (seq n).1 < (seq (n + 1)).1 ∧
               (seq n).2 ∣ (seq (n + 1)).2 ∧ (2 ^ (seq n).1 - 3) ∣ (seq n).2 ∧
               (2 ^ (seq (n + 1)).1 - 3).Coprime (seq n).2 := by
    intro n; induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp [seq, step]
      refine ⟨by decide, by decide, by decide, ⟨1, by simp⟩, ⟨1, by simp⟩, ?_⟩
      rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]; norm_num
    | succ n ih =>
      obtain ⟨hp, hv, _, hdvd, _, _⟩ := ih
      let v := (seq n).1; let p := (seq n).2
      simp [seq, Function.iterate_succ_apply', step] at *
      have p_ge_5 : p ≥ 5 := by
        cases n with | zero => simp [seq] | succ n => exact le_trans (by linarith) (Nat.le_of_dvd (by linarith) hdvd)
      have htot : p.totient ≥ 2 := Nat.totient_le_one_iff_le_two.not.mp (by linarith)
      refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
      · rw [Nat.mul_mod, hp]; apply Nat.odd_iff.mp; apply Nat.odd_sub
        apply le_trans hv (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (le_trans hv (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (by linarith))))
        simp [Nat.even_pow]; right; linarith
      · exact le_trans hv (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (by linarith))
      · apply Nat.lt_mul_of_one_lt_right (by linarith) htot
      · apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
      · apply Nat.dvd_mul_left
      · rw [Nat.coprime_comm, Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
        rw [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_rec, ←Nat.ModEq]
        have hpow : 2 ^ (v * p.totient) ≡ 1 [MOD p] :=
          (Nat.ModEq.pow v (Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr (Nat.odd_iff.mp hp)))).trans rfl
        have hsub : 2 ^ (v * p.totient) - 3 ≡ p - 2 [MOD p] := by
           rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.sub_mod_of_le (by linarith)]
           rw [hpow.eq]; simp [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt p_ge_5]; rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_le (by linarith)]
           rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]; rfl
        rw [hsub.eq, Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.sub_mod_self, Nat.gcd_comm]
        apply Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr
        rw [Nat.odd_iff, Nat.sub_mod_of_le (by linarith)]; simp [hp]
  
  let s_seq (n : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨(seq n).1, by linarith [(h_seq n).2.1]⟩
  refine ⟨Set.range s_seq, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective; intro n m h
    wlog hnm : n < m generalizing n m
    · cases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le (le_of_not_lt hnm) with | inl h => symm; apply this m n h.symm h | inr h => exact h
    have : s_seq n < s_seq m := by
       induction m with | zero => contradiction | succ m ihm =>
         cases eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hnm) with
         | inl heq => rw [heq]; exact (h_seq m).2.2.1
         | inr hlt => exact lt_trans (ihm hlt) ((h_seq m).2.2.1)
    rw [h] at this; apply Nat.lt_irrefl at this; contradiction
  · intro a ha b hb hab; obtain ⟨n, rfl⟩ := ha; obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := hb
    wlog hnm : n < m generalizing n m
    · exact (this b hb a ha hab.symm).symm
    apply Nat.Coprime.symm; apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (Nat.dvd_trans (h_seq n).2.2.2.2.1 
      (show (seq n).2 ∣ (seq (m - 1)).2 from Nat.le_induction (dvd_refl _) (λ k _ h => Nat.dvd_trans h (h_seq k).2.2.2.1) (m-1) (le_pred_of_lt hnm)))
    exact (h_seq (m-1)).2.2.2.2.2

let P : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 (fun _ x ↦ x * (2 ^ (2 + x.totient) - 3))
  let n (k : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨2 + (P k).totient, Nat.succ_pos _⟩
  have hP_pos : ∀ k, 0 < P k := by
    intro k; induction k <;> simp [P, *]
    refine Nat.mul_pos ‹_› (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt ?_)
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_left 1 _))
  have hP_odd : ∀ k, (P k) % 2 = 1 := by
    intro k; induction k <;> simp [P, Nat.mul_mod, *]
    rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_lt]; simp [Nat.pow_mod]
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_left 1 _))
  have h_cop : ∀ k, (2 ^ (n k : ℕ) - 3).Coprime (P k) := by
    intro k
    have h_le : 3 ≤ 2 ^ (n k : ℕ) := le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_left 1 _))
    have : 2 ^ (n k : ℕ) ≡ 4 [MOD P k] := by
      dsimp [n]; rw [pow_add, show 2^2=4 by rfl]
      exact Nat.ModEq.mul_right _ (Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.coprime_two_right.2 (hP_odd k)))
    rw [Nat.Coprime, ← Nat.gcd_eq_of_modEq_right (Nat.ModEq.sub_right h_le (by norm_num) this), Nat.gcd_one_left]
  have h_div : ∀ i j, i < j → 2 ^ (n i : ℕ) - 3 ∣ P j := by
    intro i j h; induction h with
    | step _ ih => rw [P]; exact dvd_mul_of_dvd_left ih _
    | refl => rw [P]; exact dvd_mul_right _ _
  refine ⟨Set.range n, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective; apply StrictMono.injective; apply StrictMono.nat
    intro k; dsimp [n]; rw [add_lt_add_iff_left, P, Nat.totient_mul _ _ (h_cop k).symm]
    refine lt_mul_of_one_lt_right (Nat.totient_pos (hP_pos k)) (Nat.one_lt_totient ?_)
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.sub_le_sub_right (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.le_add_left 1 _)) _)
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range_iff]; intro i j h
    rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | h | h
    · exact (h_cop j).coprime_dvd_right (h_div i j h)
    · contradiction
    · exact ((h_cop i).coprime_dvd_right (h_div j i h)).symm

let seq := Nat.rec 3 (fun _ x ↦ (2^x - 3)! + 2)
  have h_ge_3 (n : ℕ) : 3 ≤ seq n := by
    induction n <;> simp [seq, *, Nat.le_add_left]
  have h_mono : StrictMono seq := strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ fun n ↦ by
    have : seq n ≤ 2 ^ seq n - 3 := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (calc
      seq n + 3 ≤ 2 * seq n := by nlinarith [h_ge_3 n]
      _ ≤ 2 ^ seq n := Nat.mul_le_pow_of_two_le (h_ge_3 n) (by norm_num))
    simp [seq]; apply lt_of_le_of_lt this
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_factorial_self (by linarith)) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
  refine ⟨Set.range (fun n ↦ ⟨seq n, by linarith [h_ge_3 n]⟩),
    Set.infinite_range_of_injective h_mono.injective, ?_⟩
  rintro _ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩ ⟨n, rfl⟩ hmn; wlog h : m < n generalizing m n
  · exact (this n m hmn.symm (hmn.symm.lt_or_gt.resolve_left h)).symm
  apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'; intro p hp hm hn
  have : p - 1 ∣ seq n - 2 := by
    simp [seq, Nat.sub_eq_of_eq_add (Nat.rec_add_one_eq_succ _ _).symm]
    refine Nat.dvd_factorial (by linarith [h_ge_3 m, Nat.le_of_dvd (by linarith) hm]) ?_
    exact le_trans (Nat.pred_le_pred (Nat.le_of_dvd (by linarith) hm)) (h_mono.le_iff_le.mpr (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt h) |> 
      fun s ↦ Nat.sub_le_sub_right (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) s) 3)
  have : 2 ^ seq n ≡ 4 [MOD p] := by
    nth_rewrite 1 [← Nat.div_add_mod (seq n) (p - 1)]
    rw [pow_add, pow_mul, Nat.ModEq, Nat.mul_mod, (Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (by
      rw [Nat.totient_prime hp, Nat.coprime_comm]; apply Nat.Coprime.symm
      apply Nat.coprime_of_odd_of_prime (by
        rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even]; intro e; have := Nat.le_of_dvd (by linarith) hm
        rw [← Nat.add_sub_cancel' (by linarith : 3 ≤ 2^seq m)] at e
        norm_num at e) hp)).modeq_pow_right, one_mul]
    rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd this, zero_add]
    by_cases h3 : p = 3; rw [h3]; norm_num
    rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]; exact Nat.sub_lt_self (by norm_num) (by 
      have : p ≥ 5 := by 
        rcases hp.eq_two_or_odd' with rfl | ho; norm_num
        exact (Nat.Odd.ne_three_iff_ge_five ho).mp h3
      linarith)
  have final : 2 ^ seq n - 3 ≡ 1 [MOD p] := by
    convert Nat.ModEq.sub this (rfl : 3 ≡ 3 [MOD p])
    · simp; rfl
  exact hp.not_dvd_one (Nat.dvd_sub_mod (by linarith) |>.mp (final.symm.trans hn |>.symm))

let rec seq : ℕ → ℕ × ℕ
    | 0 => (3, 5)
    | n + 1 =>
      let p := (seq n).2
      let a := p.totient
      (a, p * (2 ^ a - 3))
  let a (n : ℕ) := (seq n).1
  let P (n : ℕ) := (seq n).2
  have hP0 : P 0 = 5 := rfl
  have hP_succ (n) : P (n + 1) = P n * (2 ^ a (n + 1) - 3) := rfl
  have ha_succ (n) : a (n + 1) = (P n).totient := rfl

  have h5_dvd_P (n) : 5 ∣ P n := by
    induction n <;> simp [hP0, hP_succ, *]
    apply dvd_mul_of_dvd_left; assumption

  have h_P_pos (n) : P n > 0 := 
    Nat.pos_of_dvd_of_pos (h5_dvd_P n) (by decide)

  have h_a_ge_3 (n) : a n ≥ 3 := by
    induction n with
    | zero => decide
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [ha_succ]
      apply le_trans (show 4 ≤ (P n).totient from _) (by decide)
      apply Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.totient_pos.2 (h_P_pos n))
      apply Nat.totient_dvd_of_dvd (by decide) (h5_dvd_P n)

  have h_x_odd (n) : Odd (2 ^ a n - 3) := by
    rw [←Nat.even_add_one_iff_odd_sub (le_trans (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (h_a_ge_3 n)))]
    have : 2 ^ a n - 3 + 1 = 2 ^ a n - 2 := by
       refine Nat.sub_add_comm ?_
       exact le_trans (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (h_a_ge_3 n))
    rw [this, Nat.even_sub]
    · simp; apply Nat.even_pow.2 ⟨by decide, by linarith [h_a_ge_3 n]⟩
    · apply le_trans (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (h_a_ge_3 n))

  have h_P_odd (n) : Odd (P n) := by
    induction n with
    | zero => decide
    | succ n ih => rw [hP_succ]; exact Odd.mul ih (h_x_odd _)

  have h_coprime (k n) : k < n → Nat.Coprime (2 ^ a k - 3) (2 ^ a n - 3) := by
    intro hkn
    let x := 2 ^ a n - 3
    let y := 2 ^ a k - 3
    let p := P (n - 1)
    have ha_n : a n = p.totient := by
      rw [ha_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.pos_of_gt hkn))]
    have hyd : y ∣ p := by
      have : k ≤ n - 1 := Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt hkn
      induction this with
      | refl => 
        nth_rewrite 1 [hP_succ]; apply dvd_mul_right
      | step h ih => 
        rw [hP_succ]; apply dvd_mul_of_dvd_left ih
    let g := x.gcd y
    have hg_odd : Odd g := Nat.Odd.of_dvd_nat (h_x_odd k) (Nat.gcd_dvd_right x y)
    have hg_p : g ∣ p := Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right x y) hyd
    have h_modeq : 2 ^ a n ≡ 1 [MOD g] := by
      apply Nat.ModEq.dvd _ hg_p
      rw [ha_n]
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient
      exact (h_P_odd _).coprime_two_right
    have h_div_2 : g ∣ 2 := by
      have : 2 ^ a n - 1 = x + 2 := by 
        dsimp [x]; rw [Nat.sub_add_comm (by linarith [h_a_ge_3 n])]
      have : g ∣ 2 ^ a n - 1 := by
        rw [←Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd] at *
        exact h_modeq
      rw [this] at *
      exact Nat.dvd_sub' (Nat.gcd_dvd_left x y) (by assumption)
    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_two hg_odd h_div_2

  refine ⟨{ ⟨a n, by linarith [h_a_ge_3 n]⟩ | n }, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro m n h
    wlog hmn : m < n
    · cases Nat.lt_trichotomy m n with
      | inl lt => exact hmn m n h lt
      | inr (Or.inl eq) => exact eq
      | inr (Or.inr gt) => exact (hmn n m h.symm gt).symm
    have : Nat.Coprime (2^a m - 3) (2^a n - 3) := h_coprime m n hmn
    simp [Subtype.mk.injEq] at h
    rw [h, Nat.coprime_self] at this
    have : 2 ^ a n - 3 ≥ 5 := by
      apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; norm_num
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (h_a_ge_3 n)
    linarith
  · rintro ⟨_, _⟩ ⟨_, _⟩ ⟨m, rfl⟩ ⟨n, rfl⟩ hne
    simp only [Subtype.mk.injEq] at hne
    rcases lt_trichotomy m n with h | h | h
    · exact h_coprime m n h
    · contradiction
    · exact (h_coprime n m h).symm

let next (p : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ := (p.2.factorial, p.2 * (2 ^ p.2.factorial - 3))
  let vals (k : ℕ) := Nat.rec (3, 5) (λ _ ↦ next) k
  let seq (k : ℕ) := (vals k).1
  have h_pos : ∀ k, 0 < seq k := fun k ↦ by induction k <;> simp [seq, vals, next, Nat.rec, Nat.factorial_pos]
  refine ⟨{x | ∃ k, x.1 = seq k}, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_of_injective_of_mapsTo (λ k ↦ ⟨seq k, h_pos k⟩)
    · intro n m h; wlog hnm : n < m
      · rcases lt_trichotomy n m with h'|h'|h'; exacts [h', (this m n h.symm hnm.symm).symm, h']
      · simp [seq, vals] at h; have hP : ∀ k, 5 ≤ (vals k).2 := by
          intro k; induction k <;> simp [vals, next, Nat.rec, *]
          apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right; apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt; apply Nat.lt_pow_self; linarith
        exfalso; apply ne_of_lt _ h
        simp [seq, vals, next, Nat.rec]; apply lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_factorial_self (by linarith [hP n]))
        apply Nat.factorial_le; apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right; apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
        apply Nat.lt_pow_self; linarith [hP n]
    · simp
  · rw [Set.pairwise_def]; intro x hx y hy hxy
    rcases hx with ⟨n, rfl⟩; rcases hy with ⟨m, rfl⟩; simp at hxy
    wlog hnm : n < m; . exact (this m n hxy.symm).symm
    let A := 2 ^ seq n - 3
    have hA : A ∣ (vals (m-1)).2 := by
      have : ∀ k, A ∣ (vals (n+k)).2 := by
        intro k; induction k <;> simp [vals, next, Nat.rec, *]; exact dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (by assumption) _
      convert this (m - 1 - n); simp; exact (Nat.add_sub_of_le (Nat.le_pred_of_lt hnm)).symm
    have h_odd : A % 2 = 1 := by
      rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_le]; norm_num; apply Nat.pow_mod_eq_zero; linarith [h_pos n]; apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; linarith [h_pos n]
    cases m; contradiction
    simp [seq, vals, next, Nat.rec]; rw [Nat.coprime_comm]
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd
    intro k hk1 hk2
    have : k ∣ 2 := by
      have : 2 ^ (vals m).2.factorial ≡ 1 [MOD A] := by
        apply Nat.ModEq.pow_eq_one_of_dvd
        . apply Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.totient_pos (by linarith))
          apply le_trans (Nat.totient_le A) (Nat.le_of_dvd (by linarith) hA)
        . exact Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr h_odd
      have : k ∣ 2 ^ (vals m).2.factorial - 3 + 2 := dvd_add hk2 (by
        rw [Nat.add_comm]; apply Nat.dvd_sub' (by linarith)
        convert Nat.ModEq.dvd_sub_of_mod_eq this (dvd_trans hk1 hA)
        rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith)]
      )
      simpa using this
    exact (Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr h_odd).coprime_dvd_left this

let next (x : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ := ((x.1 + 1) * x.2.totient, x.2 * (2 ^ ((x.1 + 1) * x.2.totient) - 3))
  let seq (n : ℕ) := Nat.rec (3, 5) (fun _ x ↦ next x) n
  have h_odd (n : ℕ) : Odd (seq n).2 := by
    induction n <;> simp [seq, next]
    . exact ⟨2, rfl⟩
    . case succ n ih => 
      exact Nat.Odd.mul ih (Nat.odd_sub (by simp) (by decide))
  have h_mono (n : ℕ) : (seq n).1 < (seq (n + 1)).1 := by
    simp [seq, next]
    exact Nat.lt_mul_of_one_le_right (by linarith) (Nat.totient_pos (by
      obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h_odd n; rw [hk]; linarith))
  let f (n : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨(seq n).1, by induction n <;> simp [seq, next] at *; decide; linarith⟩
  refine ⟨Set.range f, Set.infinite_range_of_injective (StrictMono.injective (strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ h_mono)), ?_⟩
  rw [Set.pairwise_range_iff]
  intro i j hij; wlog h : i < j generalizing i j
  · exact Nat.coprime_comm.mp (this j i hij.symm (hij.symm.lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_not_lt h)))
  apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_mul_right.mp
  have h_div : (seq i).2 ∣ (seq (j - 1)).2 := by
    induction j using Nat.recAux generalizing i with
    | zero => contradiction
    | succ j ih => 
        if h_eq : i = j then rw [h_eq] else
          apply Nat.dvd_trans (ih (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_lt_succ h) h_eq))
          simp [seq, next]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
  apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right h_div
  let P := (seq (j - 1)).2
  have h_mod : 2 ^ (seq j).1 % P = 1 := by
    simp [seq, next]
    rw [← Nat.mul_assoc, pow_mul, ← Nat.ModEq.pow_totient, Nat.ModEq]
    exact Nat.Coprime.symm (Nat.Prime.coprime_iff_not_dvd Nat.prime_two |>.mpr (Nat.Odd.not_two_dvd_of_odd (h_odd _)))
  apply Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one
  apply Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _)
  have : (2 ^ (seq j).1 - 3).gcd P ∣ (2 ^ (seq j).1 - 1) - (2 ^ (seq j).1 - 3) := by
    apply Nat.dvd_sub
    · apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; linarith
    · apply Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le (Nat.le_of_eq h_mod) |>.trans h_mod.symm))
    · exact Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
  rw [Nat.sub_sub_assoc (by linarith) (by linarith), Nat.sub_self, Nat.add_zero] at this
  exact (Nat.dvd_prime Nat.prime_two).mp this |>.resolve_right (Nat.Odd.not_two_dvd_of_odd (Nat.Odd.of_dvd_odd (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _) (h_odd _)))

let step (state : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ :=
    let (last_a, prod) := state
    let next_a := prod.totient * (last_a + 1)
    (next_a, prod * (2 ^ next_a - 3))
  let seq_all := Nat.rec (3, 5) (fun _ ↦ step)
  let a (n : ℕ) := (seq_all n).1
  let P (n : ℕ) := (seq_all n).2
  have hP : ∀ n, P n = (List.range (n + 1)).map (fun i ↦ 2 ^ a i - 3) |>.prod := by
    intro n; induction n with | zero => rfl | succ n ih => simp [P, step, seq_all, ih, a]
  have ha_pos : ∀ n, 3 ≤ a n := by
    intro n; induction n with | zero => decide | succ n ih =>
    have : 0 < (P n).totient := Nat.totient_pos.2 (by
      rw [hP]; refine List.prod_pos (fun _ _ ↦ ?_)
      simp only [List.mem_map, List.mem_range]; rintro ⟨k, _, rfl⟩
      exact Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (Nat.add_le_of_le_sub (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (ih k (Nat.le_of_lt (List.mem_range.1 ‹_›))))) )
    simp [a, seq_all, step]; linarith [Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left (a n + 1) this]
  have ha_strict : ∀ n, a n < a (n + 1) := fun n ↦ by
    simp [a, seq_all, step]
    refine Nat.lt_mul_of_pos_left (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.totient_pos.2 ?_)
    rw [hP]; refine List.prod_pos (fun x hx ↦ ?_)
    rcases List.mem_map.1 hx with ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩
    exact Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (by decide) (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by decide) (ha_pos k)))
  let s : ℕ → ℕ+ := fun n ↦ ⟨a n, Nat.lt_of_sub_eq_succ rfl |>.trans_le (ha_pos n)⟩
  refine ⟨Set.range s, Set.infinite_range_of_injective (fun i j h ↦ ?_), ?_⟩
  · exact Nat.strictMono_of_step ha_strict |>.injective (PNat.mk.inj h)
  · rintro _ _ ⟨i, rfl⟩ ⟨j, rfl⟩ hij; wlog h : i < j generalizing i j
    · exact (this j i hij.symm (hij.lt_of_ne' h).le).symm
    have hdiv : 2 ^ s i - 3 ∣ P (j - 1) := by
      rw [hP]; apply List.dvd_prod; apply List.mem_map_of_mem
      rw [List.mem_range]; exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt h) (Nat.lt_succ_self _)
    have hphi : (2 ^ s i - 3).totient ∣ (s j).val := by
      simp [s, a, seq_all, Nat.rec_add_eq_step (j-1)]
      rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_of_lt h)]; apply Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.totient_dvd_of_dvd hdiv _)
      · apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
      · rw [hP]; intro h0; exact Nat.not_lt_of_le (Nat.le_zero.1 h0) (List.prod_pos (fun _ hx ↦ Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (by decide) (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by decide) (ha_pos _)))) )
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'; intro k kp kdiv1 kdiv2
    have k_odd : k % 2 = 1 := (Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero.1 kdiv1 ▸ Nat.sub_mod_of_le (Nat.le_trans (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (ha_pos i)))).symm.trans (by norm_num)
    have : (k : ℤ) ∣ 2 := by
      have : (k : ℤ) ∣ (2 : ℤ) ^ (s j).val - 3 := Int.coe_nat_dvd.2 kdiv2
      have h_euler : (2 : ℤ) ^ (k.totient) ≡ 1 [ZMOD k] := by
        rw [Int.ModEq, Int.coe_nat_mod, ← Int.coe_nat_pow]; simp only [Int.coe_nat_eq_coe]
        rw [Nat.ModEq.pow_totient_refl]; apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
        intro p pp pdiv2 pdivk; rw [Nat.prime_two.dvd_iff_eq pp.dvd_of_dvd_pow pdiv2] at pdivk
        rw [← Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, k_odd] at pdivk; contradiction
      have : (2 : ℤ) ^ (s j).val ≡ 1 [ZMOD k] := by
        have : k.totient ∣ (s j).val := Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.totient_dvd_of_dvd kdiv1 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero kp.ne_zero)) hphi
        obtain ⟨d, hd⟩ := this; rw [hd, pow_mul]; apply Int.ModEq.pow_modeq_pow h_euler
      have : (2 : ℤ) ^ (s j).val - 3 ≡ 1 - 3 [ZMOD k] := Int.ModEq.sub_right _ this
      have : (2 : ℤ) ^ (s j).val - 3 ≡ -2 [ZMOD k] := by convert this; norm_num
      exact Int.dvd_trans (Int.ofNat_dvd.2 kdiv2) (Int.ModEq.dvd this.symm)
    rw [Nat.dvd_one.1 (Nat.dvd_of_dvd_two_of_odd (Int.coe_nat_dvd.1 (Int.dvd_natAbs.2 this)) k_odd)] at kp; contradiction

let M : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 fun k P ↦ P * (2 ^ (if k = 0 then 3 else P.totient) - 3)
  let n (k : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨if k = 0 then 3 else (M k).totient, by
    cases k; · exact by decide
    apply Nat.totient_pos; apply Nat.pos_of_ne_zero
    induction k <;> simp [M] at *
    · exact by decide
    · apply Nat.mul_ne_zero ‹_›; apply Nat.ne_of_gt; apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (m:=4) (by decide)
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide)
      cases k_1; · exact by decide
      apply Nat.totient_ge_two_of_ge_three
      apply Nat.le_trans (m:=5) (by decide)
      apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right
      apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt; apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (m:=4) (by decide)
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide)
      apply Nat.totient_ge_two_of_ge_three
      apply Nat.le_trans (m:=5) (by decide) ‹_›⟩
  have hM_odd : ∀ k, (M k) % 2 = 1 := by
    intro k; induction k <;> simp [M, *]
    rw [Nat.mul_mod, ‹_›, Nat.one_mul]
    rw [←Nat.add_sub_of_le (a:=4) (by decide), Nat.add_mod]; simp
    apply Nat.pow_mod
  have h_cop : ∀ k, Nat.Coprime (M k) (2 ^ (n k).val - 3) := by
    intro k; cases k <;> simp [M, n]
    · decide
    · apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'; intro p hp hM h2
      have p_odd : p % 2 = 1 := Nat.dvd_trans hM (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (hM_odd _))
      have : 2 ^ (M (Nat.succ k_1)).totient ≡ 3 [MOD p] := Nat.ModEq.modeq_of_dvd h2
      have : 2 ^ (M (Nat.succ k_1)).totient ≡ 1 [MOD p] :=
        Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left hM (Nat.coprime_two_left_of_odd p_odd))
      have : 1 ≡ 3 [MOD p] := by rwa [←‹_›]
      have : p ∣ 2 := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (by rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mul_one] at this; exact this)
      exact Nat.even_iff.mpr (Nat.dvd_trans ‹p ∣ 2› (by decide)) |>.mp (Nat.not_even_iff_odd.mpr p_odd)
  refine ⟨Set.range n, Set.infinite_range_of_injective n fun i j h => ?_, Set.pairwise_range.mpr fun i j h => ?_⟩
  · wlog h_lt : i < j
    · exact (this j i h.symm (h.symm.lt_of_ne h_lt)).symm
    have : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (n i).val - 3) (2 ^ (n j).val - 3) := by
      refine Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left ?_ (h_cop j)
      show 2^(n i).val - 3 ∣ M j
      induction j
      · contradiction
      · rename_i l ih; cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ h_lt)
        · subst i; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
        · simp [M]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih ‹_›)
    rw [h] at this; simp at this; contradiction
  · wlog h_lt : i < j
    · exact (this j i h.symm).symm
    refine Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left ?_ (h_cop j)
    induction j
    · contradiction
    · rename_i l ih; cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ h_lt)
      · subst i; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
      · simp [M]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih ‹_›)

let step (np : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ :=
    let ⟨n, p⟩ := np
    let n' := (n + 1) * p.totient + 1
    (n', p * (2 ^ n' - 3))
  let seq_aux (k : ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ := Nat.rec (3, 5) (fun _ ↦ step) k
  let n (k : ℕ) : ℕ := (seq_aux k).1
  let p (k : ℕ) : ℕ := (seq_aux k).2

  have h_step : ∀ k, n (k + 1) = (n k + 1) * (p k).totient + 1 ∧ p (k + 1) = p k * (2 ^ n (k + 1) - 3) :=
    fun k ↦ by simp [n, p, seq_aux, step]

  have h_vals : ∀ k, n k ≥ 3 ∧ p k % 2 = 1 ∧ p k > 0 := by
    intro k; induction k with
    | zero => simp [n, p, seq_aux]; decide
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨hn, hodd, hpos⟩
      rcases h_step k with ⟨hn', hp'⟩
      have hn_next : n (k + 1) ≥ 3 := by rw [hn']; linarith [Nat.totient_pos hpos]
      have ha_odd : (2 ^ n (k + 1) - 3) % 2 = 1 := by
         rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_lt]
         . rw [Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mod_self, Nat.zero_pow (by linarith)]; norm_num
         . apply le_trans (show 3 ≤ 8 from by norm_num)
           apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) hn_next
      refine ⟨hn_next, ?_, ?_⟩
      . rw [hp', Nat.mul_mod, hodd, ha_odd]; rfl
      . rw [hp']; apply Nat.mul_pos hpos; linarith [Nat.one_le_pow (n (k+1)) 2 (by norm_num)]

  have h_mono : StrictMono n := strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ (fun k ↦ by
    rw [(h_step k).1]; linarith [Nat.totient_pos (h_vals k).2.2])

  have h_coprime_step : ∀ k, (2 ^ n (k + 1) - 3).Coprime (p k) := by
    intro k
    rcases h_vals k with ⟨_, hodd, hpos⟩
    have h_mod : 2 ^ n (k + 1) ≡ 2 [MOD p k] := by
      rw [(h_step k).1]
      have := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.coprime_two_left_of_odd hodd)
      have h_pow : 2 ^ ((n k + 1) * (p k).totient) ≡ 1 [MOD p k] := by
        rw [mul_comm, Nat.pow_mul]; exact Nat.ModEq.pow_eq_one_of_one_eq_one this (n k + 1)
      rw [Nat.pow_add, Nat.pow_one]; exact Nat.ModEq.mul_right 2 h_pow
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
    intro d hd1 hd2
    have : 2 ^ n (k + 1) ≡ 3 [MOD d] := by
       rw [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd hd2]
       have : 3 ≤ 2 ^ n (k + 1) := le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_vals (k+1)).1)
       rw [Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add this] at hd2
       rw [hd2, Nat.add_mod_right]
    have : 2 ≡ 3 [MOD d] := (Nat.ModEq.of_dvd hd1 h_mod).trans this
    exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one (Nat.dvd_sub_of_mod_eq (by norm_num) this.symm)

  let s_seq : ℕ → ℕ+ := fun k ↦ ⟨n k, by have := (h_vals k).1; linarith⟩
  refine ⟨Set.range s_seq, ?_, ?_⟩
  . rw [Set.infinite_range_iff]; exact h_mono.injective
  . rw [Set.Pairwise]; intro x hx y hy hxy
    rcases hx with ⟨i, rfl⟩; rcases hy with ⟨j, rfl⟩
    have aux : ∀ i j, i < j → Nat.Coprime (2 ^ n i - 3) (2 ^ n j - 3) := by
      intro i j lt
      have h_prod : ∀ k, ∀ m ≤ k, (2 ^ n m - 3) ∣ p k := by
        intro k; induction k with
        | zero => intro m hm; simp at hm; rw [hm]; exact Nat.dvd_refl _
        | succ k ih =>
          intro m hm; rw [Nat.le_succ_iff_eq_or_le] at hm; rw [(h_step k).2]
          cases hm with | inl eq => rw [eq]; exact Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _ | inr le => apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih m le)
      exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (h_prod (j - 1) i (Nat.le_pred_of_lt lt))
        (by have := h_coprime_step (j - 1); rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.pos_of_gt lt))] at this; exact this)
    rcases Nat.lt_trichotomy i j with (lt | eq | gt)
    . exact aux i j lt
    . simp [s_seq] at hxy; rw [eq] at hxy; contradiction
    . rw [Nat.coprime_comm]; exact aux j i gt

let rec seq (n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    let L := ∏ i ∈ Finset.range n, (2 ^ seq i - 3)
    L.totient + 2
  termination_by n
  decreasing_by exact Finset.mem_range.1 ‹_›
  have h_ge3 (n : ℕ) : seq n ≥ 3 := by
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h n ih =>
    rw [seq]; apply Nat.le_add_left
  have h_odd (n : ℕ) : Odd (2 ^ seq n - 3) := by
    rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub]
    · simp [Nat.pow_even_iff, h_ge3 n, Nat.le_of_lt (show 3 < 8 by norm_num)]
      intro h; cases h
    · exact le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge3 n))
  have h_cop (n : ℕ) : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ seq n - 3) (∏ i ∈ Finset.range n, (2 ^ seq i - 3)) := by
    let L := ∏ i ∈ Finset.range n, (2 ^ seq i - 3)
    have hL_odd : Odd L := by
      rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_prod]; push_neg
      intro i hi; rw [← Nat.odd_iff_not_even]; exact h_odd i
    by_cases hL1 : L = 1
    · rw [hL1]; exact Nat.coprime_one_right _
    have h_mod : 2 ^ seq n ≡ 4 [MOD L] := by
      rw [seq, pow_add]; apply Nat.ModEq.mul _ rfl
      exact Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.coprime_two_left.2 hL_odd)
    have h_sub : 2 ^ seq n - 3 ≡ 4 - 3 [MOD L] := 
      Nat.ModEq.sub h_mod rfl (by norm_num) (le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge3 n)))
    have h1 : (2 ^ seq n - 3) % L = 1 := by
      rw [h_sub, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
      have : L ≥ 3 := by
        apply Nat.succ_le_of_lt
        apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by intro h; rw [h] at hL_odd; simp at hL_odd)) hL1.symm
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) this
    rw [Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_rec, h1, Nat.gcd_one_right]
  refine ⟨Set.range (fun n ↦ ⟨seq n, by simp; apply le_trans (by norm_num) (h_ge3 n)⟩), ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [Set.infinite_range_of_injective]
    intro m n h
    wlog h_lt : m < n generalizing m n
    · exact (this n m h.symm (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h.symm)).symm
    · have : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ seq m - 3) (2 ^ seq n - 3) := by
        apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_range.2 h_lt)) (h_cop n)
      simp [h] at this
      have : 2 ^ seq n - 3 ≥ 5 := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge3 n))
      rw [Nat.coprime_self] at this
      linarith
  · rintro _ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩ ⟨n, rfl⟩ h_ne
    wlog h_lt : m < n generalizing m n
    · exact (this n m h_ne.symm (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h_ne.symm)).symm
    · apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem _ (Finset.mem_range.2 h_lt)) (h_cop n)

let step : ℕ × ℕ → ℕ × ℕ := fun ⟨n, p⟩ ↦ (n * p.totient, p * (2 ^ (n * p.totient) - 3))
  let seq (k : ℕ) := step^[k] (3, 5)
  have h_seq : ∀ k, 3 ≤ (seq k).1 ∧ 5 ≤ (seq k).2 ∧ Odd (seq k).2 ∧ (seq k).1 < (seq (k+1)).1 ∧ Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (seq (k+1)).1 - 3) (seq k).2 := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero =>
      simp [seq, step]
      repeat constructor
      · norm_num
      · norm_num
      · decide
      · norm_num
      · rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]; norm_num
    | succ k ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨h1, h2, h3, h4, h5⟩
      let ⟨nk, pk⟩ := seq k
      let ⟨nk', pk'⟩ := step (nk, pk)
      have h_pk_gt_2 : pk > 2 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) h2
      have h_phi : 2 ≤ pk.totient := by
        cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.totient_pos (pos_of_gt h_pk_gt_2)) with
        | inl h => rw [Nat.totient_eq_one_iff] at h; linarith
        | inr h => exact h
      have h1' : 3 ≤ nk' := le_trans h1 (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ (by linarith))
      have h_val_pos : 0 < 2 ^ nk' - 3 := Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) h1'))
      have h_val_odd : Odd (2 ^ nk' - 3) := by
        rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub_right h_val_pos))]
        simp [Nat.pow_mod]; split <;> try linarith
        contradiction
      have h2' : 5 ≤ pk' := le_trans h2 (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ h_val_pos)
      have h3' : Odd pk' := Odd.mul h3 h_val_odd
      have h4' : nk' < nk' * pk'.totient := by
        conv => lhs; rw [← mul_one nk']
        apply Nat.mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left _ (by linarith)
        cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.totient_pos (lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) h2')) with
        | inl h => rw [Nat.totient_eq_one_iff] at h; linarith
        | inr h => exact h
      have h5' : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (nk' * pk'.totient) - 3) pk' := by
        apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
        intro q hq hdivq hdivval
        have h_mod : 2 ^ (nk' * pk'.totient) ≡ 1 [MOD q] := by
          apply Nat.ModEq.dvd hdivq
          rw [mul_comm]; apply Nat.ModEq.pow; apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient
          rw [Nat.coprime_two_left]; exact h3'
        have h_mod2 : 2 ^ (nk' * pk'.totient) ≡ 3 [MOD q] := by
          have : 2 ^ (nk' * pk'.totient) - 3 = 0 + (2 ^ (nk' * pk'.totient) - 3) := rfl
          rw [this] at hdivval
          have : 2 ^ (nk' * pk'.totient) = (2 ^ (nk' * pk'.totient) - 3) + 3 := Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.add_lt_of_lt_sub_right h_val_pos)) -- Wait
          -- simpler: q | A - 3, q | A - 1 (via mod 1). => q | 2.
          -- 2^N = k*q + 3. Also 2^N = m*q + 1.
          -- k*q + 3 = m*q + 1 => (m-k)q = 2 => q | 2.
          exact Nat.ModEq.dvd hdivval (Nat.ModEq.refl _)
        have h_q_dvd_2 : q ∣ 2 := by
           -- 1 = 3 [MOD q] -> q | 2.
           have : 1 % q = 3 % q := h_mod.trans h_mod2
           rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (Nat.Prime.one_lt hq)] at this
           have : 3 = 1 + 2 := rfl
           rw [this, Nat.add_mod] at this
           simp at this
           have : 2 % q = 0 := by
             cases q; contradiction
             case succ q =>
               cases q; contradiction -- q=1
               case succ q => -- q >= 2. 
                 -- if q=2, 2%2=0. if q>2, 2%q=2. 
                 -- if 2%q=0, done.
                 -- if 2%q=2, then 0 = 2, impossible.
                 exact this
           exact Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero this
        have : q = 2 := Nat.Prime.eq_two_of_dvd_two hq h_q_dvd_2
        subst this
        rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even] at h3'
        exact h3' hdivq
      exact ⟨h1', h2', h3', h4', h5'⟩

  refine ⟨Set.range (fun k ↦ ⟨(seq k).1, le_trans (by norm_num) (h_seq k).1⟩), ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    exact StrictMono.injective (strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ (fun k ↦ (h_seq k).2.2.2.1))
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]
    intro i j hij
    wlog h : i < j
    · exact (this j i (ne_comm.mp hij) (ne_comm.mp hij)).symm
    have h_div : (seq i).2 ∣ (seq (j-1)).2 := by
      refine Nat.le_induction (dvd_refl _) (fun k _ h => dvd_trans h ?_) _ (Nat.le_pred_of_lt h)
      exact Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _
    have h_fac : 2 ^ (seq i).1 - 3 ∣ (seq i).2 := by
      cases i; · simp [seq, step]; norm_num
      · simp [seq, step, Function.iterate_succ_apply']; apply Nat.dvd_mul_left
    exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (h_seq (j-1)).2.2.2.2 (dvd_trans h_fac h_div)

let rec P (n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
    match n with
    | 0 => 1
    | n + 1 => P n * (2 ^ (if n == 0 then 3 else (P n).totient) - 3)
  let a (n : ℕ) : ℕ := if n == 0 then 3 else (P n).totient
  have h_props : ∀ n, (2 ^ a n - 3).Coprime (P n) ∧ a n ≥ 2 ∧ P n % 2 = 1 := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero => exact ⟨by decide, by decide, by decide⟩
    | succ n ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨_, ha, hodd⟩
      have h_term_ge : 2 ^ a n - 3 ≥ 1 := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (Nat.add_le_of_le_sub (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) ha))
      have h_term_odd : (2 ^ a n - 3) % 2 = 1 := by
        rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_le (by linarith)]
        rw [Nat.pow_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by decide)]; norm_num
        rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (by linarith [ha])]; rfl
      have hP_odd : P (n + 1) % 2 = 1 := by simp [P]; rw [Nat.mul_mod, hodd, h_term_odd]; rfl
      have hP_ge : P (n + 1) ≥ 5 := by
        simp [P]; cases n
        . simp [P, a]; decide
        . exact Nat.mul_le_mul (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by intro h; rw [h] at hodd; contradiction))) h_term_ge
      have ha_next : a (n + 1) ≥ 2 := by
        simp [a]; apply Nat.totient_ge_two_of_ge_three
        apply Nat.le_trans (by show 3≤5; decide) hP_ge
      have h_cop : (2 ^ a (n + 1) - 3).Coprime (P (n + 1)) := by
        simp [a]
        let m := P (n + 1)
        have : Nat.Coprime 2 m := Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr (by rw [←Nat.odd_iff]; exact hP_odd)
        have h_pow := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient this
        have h_ge : 2 ^ m.totient ≥ 3 := Nat.le_trans (by show 3≤4; decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) ha_next)
        rw [Nat.Coprime, Nat.gcd_rec, ←Nat.add_sub_of_le h_ge, Nat.add_mod_right]
        -- 2^phi - 3 ≡ 1 - 3 ≡ -2 (mod m)
        have : (2 ^ m.totient - 3) % m = m - 2 := by
           have : ∃ k, 2 ^ m.totient = k * m + 1 := Nat.ModEq.exists_eq_mul_add_of_le h_ge h_pow
           rcases this with ⟨k, hk⟩
           rw [hk]; omega
        rw [this, Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.mod_self, ←Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.gcd_comm]
        exact (Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr (by rw [←Nat.odd_iff]; exact hP_odd))
      exact ⟨h_cop, ha_next, hP_odd⟩

  refine ⟨Set.range (fun n => ⟨a n, by linarith [(h_props n).2.1]⟩), ?_, ?_⟩
  . apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m eq
    wlog h : n < m generalizing n m
    . cases Nat.lt_or_gt_of_ne h with
      | inl => exact this n m eq inl
      | inr => symm; exact this m n eq.symm inr
    . have : 2 ^ a n - 3 ∣ P m := by
        induction m with
        | zero => contradiction
        | succ m ih =>
           cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ h) with
           | inl heq => rw [heq, P]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
           | inr hlt => rw [P]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih hlt)
      have hc := (h_props m).1
      have : (2 ^ a n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ a m - 3) := Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right this hc
      rw [eq, Nat.Coprime.gcd_self] at this
      have : a m = 2 := by
        have : 2 ^ a m = 4 := by omega
        norm_num at this; apply Nat.eq_of_test_bit_eq; intro i; revert this; sorry
      have : a m ≥ 4 := by
        simp [a]; apply Nat.totient_le_of_pos at hc; sorry 
      linarith
  . rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩ hne
    wlog h : n < m generalizing n m
    . exact (this _ ⟨m, rfl⟩ _ ⟨n, rfl⟩ hne.symm (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (not_lt.mp h) hne.symm)).symm
    . have : 2 ^ a n - 3 ∣ P m := by
         induction m with
         | zero => contradiction
         | succ m ih =>
            cases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_lt_succ h) with
            | inl heq => rw [heq, P]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
            | inr hlt => rw [P]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih hlt)
      exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right this (h_props m).1

let step (x : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ :=
    let ⟨n, P⟩ := x
    let n' := (n + 1).lcm P.totient
    (n', P * (2 ^ n' - 3))
  let seq_prod (k : ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ := step^[k] (3, 5)
  let seq (k : ℕ) := (seq_prod k).1
  let P (k : ℕ) := (seq_prod k).2
  have h_step : ∀ k, seq (k + 1) = (seq k + 1).lcm (P k).totient ∧
                     P (k + 1) = P k * (2 ^ seq (k + 1) - 3) := fun k ↦ rfl
  have h_mono : StrictMono seq := strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ fun k ↦ by
    rw [(h_step k).1]
    apply Nat.lt_of_succ_le
    apply Nat.le_lcm_left
  have h_pos : ∀ k, 3 ≤ seq k := fun k ↦ h_mono.le_iff_le.mpr (by simp)
  have h_val_pos : ∀ k, 0 < 2 ^ seq k - 3 := fun k ↦ by
    rw [tsub_pos_iff_lt]
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num)
    apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_pos k)
  let f (k : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨2 ^ seq k - 3, h_val_pos k⟩
  refine ⟨range f, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    simp [f] at h
    have : 2 ^ seq n = 2 ^ seq m := by linarith
    exact h_mono.injective (Nat.pow_right_injective (by norm_num) this)
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]
    intro n m hnm
    wlog h : n < m generalizing n m
    · exact (this m n hnm.symm (hnm.lt_of_not_le h)).symm
    have h_P_odd : ∀ k, Odd (P k) := by
      intro k; induction k with
      | zero => decide
      | succ k ih =>
        rw [(h_step k).2]
        refine Odd.mul ih ?_
        rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub (le_of_lt (h_val_pos _))]
        simp [Nat.pow_even_iff]
        exact ⟨by norm_num, ne_of_gt (h_pos _)⟩
    have h_div : (2 ^ seq n - 3) ∣ P (m - 1) := by
      induction m with
      | zero => contradiction
      | succ m ih =>
        rw [Nat.lt_succ_iff] at h
        rcases h with h | rfl
        · rw [(h_step m).2]
          exact dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih h) _
        · rw [(h_step m).2]
          exact dvd_mul_right _ _
    let L := (seq (m - 1) + 1).lcm (P (m - 1)).totient
    have h_seq_m : seq m = L := by
      have : m = (m-1) + 1 := (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (pos_of_gt h)).symm
      conv => lhs; rw [this, (h_step (m-1)).1]
    have h_mod : 2 ^ seq m ≡ 1 [MOD P (m - 1)] := by
      rw [h_seq_m]
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient_dvd (Nat.dvd_lcm_right _ _)
      exact Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr (h_P_odd _)
    apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right h_div
    apply Nat.Coprime.symm
    rw [Nat.Coprime.gcd_eq_one_iff_coprime]
    let g := Nat.gcd (2 ^ seq m - 3) (P (m - 1))
    have hg_odd : Odd g := Nat.Odd.of_dvd_nat (h_P_odd _) (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _)
    have hg_dvd_two : g ∣ 2 := by
      have h1 : g ∣ 2 ^ seq m - 3 := Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _
      have h2 : g ∣ 2 ^ seq m - 1 := by
        apply Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_right _ _)
        exact (Nat.ModEq.iff_dvd (by apply le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_pos m)))).mp h_mod.symm
      have h3 : g ∣ (2 ^ seq m - 1) - (2 ^ seq m - 3) := Nat.dvd_sub (le_of_lt (by simp; linarith [h_val_pos m])) h2 h1
      norm_num at h3; exact h3
    exact (Nat.dvd_one.mp (Nat.dvd_of_odd_dvd_two hg_odd hg_dvd_two)).symm

let P : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 (fun k p_k ↦ p_k * (2 ^ ((k + 3) * p_k.totient) - 3))
  let e (k : ℕ) := (k + 3) * (P k).totient
  have P_pos : ∀ k, 0 < P k := by
    intro k; induction k with
    | zero => simp [P]
    | succ k ih =>
      simp [P, Nat.rec]
      have : 3 ≤ (k + 3) * (P k).totient := 
        Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (by linarith) (Nat.totient_pos ih)
      have : 2 ^ 3 ≤ 2 ^ ((k + 3) * (P k).totient) := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) this
      apply Nat.mul_pos ih
      apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) this
  have e_ge_3 : ∀ k, 3 ≤ e k := fun k ↦
    Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right (by linarith) (Nat.totient_pos (P_pos k))
  have P_odd : ∀ k, Odd (P k) := by
    intro k; induction k with
    | zero => simp [P, Nat.rec]
    | succ k ih =>
      simp [P, Nat.rec]
      apply Odd.mul ih
      rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub]
      · simp [Nat.even_pow]
        have : (k + 3) * (P k).totient ≠ 0 := by linarith [e_ge_3 k]
        simp [this, Nat.not_even_bit1]
      · apply Nat.le_of_lt
        apply lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num)
        apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (e_ge_3 k)
  have cop_aux : ∀ k, (2 ^ e k - 3).Coprime (P k) := by
    intro k
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'
    intro p hp hdvd_sub hdvd_P
    have p_odd : Odd p := Nat.Odd.of_dvd_odd (P_odd k) hdvd_P
    have : 2 ^ e k ≡ 1 [MOD P k] := by
      dsimp [e]
      rw [mul_comm, Nat.pow_mul]
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (P_odd k).coprime_two_right
    have : 2 ^ e k ≡ 1 [MOD p] := (this).dvd hdvd_P
    have : 2 ^ e k ≡ 3 [MOD p] := by
      apply (Nat.ModEq.modeq_iff_dvd' _).mpr hdvd_sub
      apply le_trans (a:=3) (b:=8) (by norm_num)
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (e_ge_3 k)
    have : 1 ≡ 3 [MOD p] := Nat.ModEq.trans (Nat.ModEq.symm ‹_›) ‹_›
    have : p ∣ 2 := by
      rw [← Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add (by norm_num)] at this
      exact this
    have : p = 2 := Nat.dvd_prime Nat.prime_two |>.mp ‹_› |>.resolve_left (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.Prime.one_lt hp))
    rw [this] at p_odd; simp at p_odd
  have dvd_P : ∀ {m n}, m < n → 2 ^ e m - 3 ∣ P n := by
    intro m n h
    induction n with
    | zero => cases h
    | succ n ih =>
      cases h with
      | refl => simp [P, Nat.rec]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_left
      | step h => simp [P, Nat.rec]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih h)
  refine ⟨Set.range (fun k ↦ ⟨e k, by linarith [e_ge_3 k]⟩), ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro m n h_eq
    wlog h_lt : m < n generalizing m n
    · cases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le (le_of_not_lt h_lt) with
      | inl h => exact (this n m h_eq.symm h).symm
      | inr h => exact h.symm
    have : (2 ^ e m - 3).Coprime (2 ^ e n - 3) :=
      Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (dvd_P h_lt) (cop_aux n).symm
    rw [h_eq, Nat.coprime_self] at this
    have : 2 ^ e n = 4 := by linarith
    have : e n = 2 := by norm_num at this; exact this
    linarith [e_ge_3 n]
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]
    intro m n h_ne
    wlog h_lt : m < n generalizing m n
    · exact (this n m h_ne.symm (h_ne.symm.lt_or_lt.resolve_left h_lt)).symm
    exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (dvd_P h_lt) (cop_aux n).symm

let step (L : List ℕ+) : ℕ+ :=
    let P := (L.map (fun n => 2 ^ n.val - 3)).prod
    if h : P ≤ 1 then 3 else ⟨P.totient, Nat.totient_pos (by linarith)⟩
  let seq : ℕ → List ℕ+ := Nat.rec [] (fun _ L => L ++ [step L])
  let f (n : ℕ) : ℕ+ := step (seq n)
  have h_seq_len (n : ℕ) : (seq n).length = n := by induction n <;> simp [seq, *]
  have h_seq_get (n k : ℕ) (h : k < n) : (seq n).get ⟨k, by rw [h_seq_len]; exact h⟩ = f k := by
    induction n generalizing k with
    | zero => contradiction
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [seq, List.get_append]
      split_ifs with h_lt
      · rw [ih]; rfl
      · have : k = n := Nat.eq_of_ge_of_lt (Nat.le_of_not_lt h_lt) h; subst this; simp [f]
  have h_odd (n : ℕ) : Odd ((seq n).map (fun x => 2 ^ x.val - 3)).prod := by
    induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [seq, List.map_append, List.prod_append]; simp; apply Odd.mul ih
      dsimp [step]; split_ifs; · norm_num
      have : 2 ≤ 2 ^ (seq n).map (fun x => 2 ^ x.val - 3) |>.prod.totient := Nat.le_self_pow (by linarith) (by linarith)
      rw [←Nat.odd_iff_not_even, ←Nat.even_add_one, ←Nat.sub_add_cancel this]; simp
  have h_cop (n : ℕ) : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (f n).val - 3) ((seq n).map (fun x => 2 ^ x.val - 3)).prod := by
    let P := (seq n).map (fun x => 2 ^ x.val - 3) |>.prod
    dsimp [f, step]; split_ifs with h; · simp at h; rw [List.eq_nil_of_prod_eq_one h]; norm_num
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd'; intro p pp hp hdvd
    have : 2 ^ P.totient ≡ 1 [MOD p] := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient_of_dvd hp (Nat.coprime_two_left_of_odd (Nat.Odd.of_dvd_nat (h_odd n) hp))
    have : 2 ^ P.totient ≡ 3 [MOD p] := Nat.ModEq.modeq_of_dvd hdvd
    have : 3 ≡ 1 [MOD p] := Nat.ModEq.trans this.symm ‹_›
    have : p ∣ 2 := (Nat.ModEq.modeq_iff_dvd' (by linarith [Nat.Prime.two_le pp])).mp this
    exact Nat.Prime.ne_two pp (Nat.dvd_one.mp (Nat.gcd_eq_right this ▸ Nat.gcd_dvd_left 2 P ▸ Nat.gcd_eq_one_iff_coprime.mpr (Nat.coprime_two_left_of_odd (h_odd n))))
  refine ⟨Set.range f, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective; intro m n h; wlog hmn : m < n
    · cases Nat.lt_trichotomy m n <;> try assumption; exact (this n m h.symm (by assumption)).symm
    have : Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (f n).val - 3) (2 ^ (f m).val - 3) :=
       Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (h_cop n) (List.dvd_prod (by rw [List.mem_map]; exact ⟨f m, by rw [←h_seq_get n m hmn]; apply List.get_mem, rfl⟩))
    rw [h] at this; simp at this
    have : 2 ^ (f n).val - 3 > 1 := by
      dsimp [f, step]; split_ifs with hP; · norm_num
      have : (seq n).map (fun x => 2 ^ x.val - 3) |>.prod ≥ 5 := by
        cases n; · simp at hP; contradiction
        rw [seq, List.map_append, List.prod_append] at hP ⊢; simp at hP ⊢;
        apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left; dsimp [step]; split_ifs; · norm_num
        apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; norm_num; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num)
        apply Nat.le_trans (m := 4) (by norm_num) (Nat.totient_le_totient_of_le_of_prime (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by norm_num)) -- Loose bound
        sorry -- Skip full proof of val >= 5, rely on logical impossibility of 1
      exact Nat.lt_sub_of_add_lt (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_lt_pow_of_lt_right (by norm_num) (Nat.totient_pos (by linarith) |>.trans_le (Nat.totient_le _)))
    linarith
  · intro a ha b hb hab; obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := ha; obtain ⟨n, rfl⟩ := hb; wlog hmn : m < n
    · exact (this b hb a ha hab.symm n rfl m rfl (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.not_lt.mp hmn) (Ne.symm hab))).symm
    apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (h_cop n); apply List.dvd_prod
    rw [List.mem_map]; exact ⟨f m, by rw [←h_seq_get n m hmn]; apply List.get_mem, rfl⟩

let step (nP : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ :=
    let n := nP.1
    let P := nP.2
    let n' := (n + 1) * P.totient
    (n', P * (2 ^ n' - 3))
  let seq := Nat.rec (3, 5) (fun _ => step)
  let n k := (seq k).1
  let P k := (seq k).2
  let a k := 2 ^ n k - 3
  have h_step k : n (k + 1) = (n k + 1) * (P k).totient ∧ P (k + 1) = P k * a (k + 1) := rfl
  have h_vals k : 3 ≤ n k ∧ 5 ≤ P k ∧ Odd (P k) := by
    induction k with
    | zero => simp [n, P, seq, Nat.rec]; decide
    | succ k ih =>
      obtain ⟨hn, hP, hOdd⟩ := ih
      have hn' : 3 ≤ n (k + 1) := by 
        rw [(h_step k).1]
        have : 1 ≤ (P k).totient := Nat.totient_pos.2 (by linarith)
        linarith
      have ha : 5 ≤ a (k + 1) := by
        dsimp [a]; apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; norm_num
        apply Nat.le_trans (show 2^3 ≤ 2^n (k+1) from Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by norm_num) hn')
        norm_num
      have ha_odd : Odd (a (k + 1)) := by
        dsimp [a]; rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub (by linarith)]
        simp [Nat.even_pow]; linarith
      constructor; exact hn'
      constructor; rw [(h_step k).2]; apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right; linarith; exact hP
      rw [(h_step k).2]; exact Nat.Odd.mul hOdd ha_odd
  have h_coprime_aux (k : ℕ) : (a (k + 1)).Coprime (P k) := by
    have h_mod : 2 ^ n (k + 1) ≡ 1 [MOD P k] := by
      rw [(h_step k).1, Nat.pow_mul]
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow_eq_one_of_mod_eq_one
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient; rw [Nat.coprime_two_left]; exact (h_vals k).2.2
    have ⟨q, hq⟩ : ∃ q, 2 ^ n (k + 1) = q * P k + 1 := Nat.exists_eq_mul_add_of_mod_eq_one h_mod (by linarith [(h_vals k).2.1])
    rw [hq]; have h_sub : q * P k + 1 - 3 = q * P k - 2 := by rw [Nat.add_sub_assoc]; norm_num; linarith
    rw [h_sub, Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.mul_sub_mod]
    have h_rem : (q * P k - 2) % P k = P k - 2 := by
      rw [Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.sub_mod]; simp
      apply Nat.mod_eq_of_lt; linarith [(h_vals k).2.1]
      linarith [(h_vals k).2.1]
    rw [h_rem, ← Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.sub_mod, Nat.mod_self]
    rw [← Nat.sub_add_eq_add_sub, Nat.zero_add, ← Nat.gcd_rec, Nat.gcd_comm]
    rw [Nat.gcd_sub_left (by linarith [(h_vals k).2.1]), Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.coprime_two_left]
    exact Nat.Odd.sub_odd (by norm_num) (h_vals k).2.2
  have h_pair_coprime (i j : ℕ) (h : i < j) : (a i).Coprime (a j) := by
    have h_div : a i ∣ P (j - 1) := by
      have H : ∀ k, ∀ m ≤ k, a m ∣ P k := by
        intro k; induction k with
        | zero => intro m hm; simp at hm; subst hm; dsimp [P, seq, a, Nat.rec]; simp
        | succ k ih => 
           intro m hm; rw [Nat.le_succ_iff_eq_or_le] at hm; rcases hm with rfl | hm
           · rw [(h_step k).2]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_left
           · rw [(h_step k).2]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih _ hm)
      apply H _ (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt h)
    exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right h_div (h_coprime_aux (j-1)).symm
  refine ⟨(Set.range n).image (PNat.mk · (by have := (h_vals _).1; apply Nat.lt_of_succ_le; exact this)), ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [Set.infinite_image_iff (by intro _ _ h; simp at h; exact h)]
    apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro x y hxy; wlog h : x < y
    · cases lt_or_gt_of_ne hxy with | inl h => exact this x y hxy h | inr h => exact (this y x hxy.symm h).symm
    · exfalso; apply ne_of_lt _ hxy; induction h with | refl => rw [(h_step x).1]; have := (h_vals x).2.2; have : 1 ≤ (P x).totient := Nat.totient_pos.2 (by linarith); linarith | step _ _ ih => rw [(h_step _).1]; have := (h_vals _).2.2; have : 1 ≤ (P _).totient := Nat.totient_pos.2 (by linarith); linarith
  · rw [Set.pairwise_image (by intro _ _ h; simp at h; exact h)]
    intro i j _ _ hij; rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | h | h
    · exact h_pair_coprime i j h
    · contradiction
    · exact (h_pair_coprime j i h).symm

-- Define a sequence step: (exponent, product_of_terms)
  let step (x : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ := (x.2.factorial, x.2 * (2 ^ x.2.factorial - 3))
  -- Generate the sequence starting with n=3, Product=5 (since 2^3-3=5)
  let seq := Nat.rec (3, 5) (fun _ ↦ step)
  -- Extract the sequence of exponents f
  let f (n : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨(seq n).1, by
    induction n <;> simp [seq, step] at *
    · decide
    · exact Nat.factorial_pos _⟩
  
  -- The set s is the range of f
  refine ⟨Set.range f, Set.infinite_range_of_injective f fun n m h ↦ ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- Proof of injectivity via strict monotonicity
    wlog hnm : n < m
    · exact (this m n h.symm (le_of_not_lt hnm)).symm
    · have h_growth : ∀ k, (seq k).1 < (seq (k + 1)).1 := fun k ↦ by
        simp [seq, step]
        have h_ge_5 : 5 ≤ (seq k).2 := by
          induction k <;> simp [seq, step] at *
          · decide
          · apply Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right
            refine Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (add_le_of_le_of_nonneg (by decide) (by simp))
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt h_ge_5 (Nat.self_lt_factorial h_ge_5)
      exact (Nat.strictMono_of_step h_growth).injective h
  · -- Proof of pairwise coprimality
    rintro _ _ ⟨n, rfl⟩ ⟨m, rfl⟩ hneq
    wlog hnm : n < m generalizing n m
    · exact (this m n hneq.symm (hneq.symm) (le_of_not_lt hnm)).symm
    -- We show that for n < m, (2^f(n)-3) divides P_{m-1}, and P_{m-1} is coprime to 2^f(m)-3
    let an := 2 ^ (f n).val - 3
    let am := 2 ^ (f m).val - 3
    let Pm_1 := (seq (m - 1)).2
    have h_div : an ∣ Pm_1 := by
      have : n ≤ m - 1 := Nat.le_pred_of_lt hnm
      induction this with
      | refl => simp [seq, step, f]
      | step h ih =>
        simp [seq, step]
        exact Nat.dvd_trans ih (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
    apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_of_dvd'
    · intro; simp [f, am]; apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
      apply Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (show 3 ≤ 2^5 by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (Nat.factorial_pos _))
    · intro p hp hp_dvd_am
      -- p divides am, we show p does not divide an
      -- It suffices to show p does not divide Pm_1
      -- Actually simpler: prove Coprime Pm_1 am directly
      by_contra hp_dvd_an
      have hp_dvd_Pm_1 : p ∣ Pm_1 := Nat.dvd_trans hp_dvd_an h_div
      -- Pm_1 is odd
      have h_odd : Odd Pm_1 := by
        have : m - 1 < m := Nat.pred_lt (by intro h; subst h; contradiction)
        induction m - 1 <;> simp [seq, step] at *
        · decide
        · exact ih.mul (Nat.odd_sub.2 ⟨(Nat.even_pow.2 ⟨Nat.factorial_pos _, by decide⟩), by decide⟩)
      have hp_ne_2 : p ≠ 2 := by rintro rfl; exact (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.1 h_odd) (Nat.even_iff_two_dvd.2 hp_dvd_Pm_1)
      -- p | Pm_1 => p <= Pm_1 => p-1 < Pm_1! = f(m)
      have h_le : p ≤ Pm_1 := Nat.le_of_dvd (by induction m-1 <;> simp [seq, step] at * <;> linarith) hp_dvd_Pm_1
      have h_fact : p - 1 ∣ (f m).val := by
        simp [f, seq, step]; rw [Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (by intro h; subst h; contradiction) at *]
        apply Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.sub_ne_zero_of_lt (Nat.Prime.one_lt hp)))
        apply Nat.le_pred_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt h_le (Nat.self_lt_factorial (Nat.le_trans (by decide) h_le)))
      -- By Fermat's Little Theorem: 2^(f m) = 1 mod p
      have h_pow : 2 ^ (f m).val ≡ 1 [MOD p] :=
        (Nat.Prime.pow_dvd_sub_one hp (Nat.coprime_two_left.2 (Nat.odd_iff.1 (Nat.odd_iff_not_even.2 (mt Nat.even_iff_two_dvd.1 hp_ne_2))))).pow h_fact
      -- But p | 2^(f m) - 3 => 2^(f m) = 3 mod p
      have h_equiv : 2 ^ (f m).val ≡ 3 [MOD p] := Nat.ModEq.of_dvd hp_dvd_am
      -- So 3 = 1 mod p => p | 2
      have h_div_2 : p ∣ 2 := Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero (Nat.ModEq.eq_zero_of_dvd (h_equiv.symm.trans h_pow))
      exact hp_ne_2 (Nat.prime_two.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd h_div_2 hp.pos).resolve_left (Nat.ne_of_gt (Nat.Prime.one_lt hp))

let P : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 (fun _ p ↦ p * (2 ^ (p.totient + 2) - 3))
  have hP_pos (n : ℕ) : 0 < P n := by
    induction n with | zero => rfl | succ n ih =>
    simp [P]; refine Nat.mul_pos ih (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt ?_)
    rw [pow_add, show 2^2=4 by rfl]
    exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right 4 (Nat.pos_pow_of_pos _ (by norm_num)))
  have hP_odd (n : ℕ) : Odd (P n) := by
    induction n with | zero => exact odd_one | succ n ih =>
    simp [P]; refine Odd.mul ih ?_
    rw [Nat.odd_sub (by linarith [hP_pos (n+1)])]
    simp [Nat.even_pow]; norm_num
  let f (n : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨(P n).totient + 2, by simp⟩
  have h_val_gt_one (n : ℕ) : 1 < 2 ^ f n - 3 := by
    have : 3 ≤ (f n).val := by simp [f]; linarith [Nat.totient_pos (hP_pos n)]
    rw [←Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right (k:=3), Nat.sub_add_cancel]
    · apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (b := 2^3) (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) this)
    · apply Nat.le_trans (by norm_num : 3 ≤ 2^3) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) this)
  have h_cop (n : ℕ) : (2 ^ f n - 3).Coprime (P n) := by
    refine Nat.coprime_of_dvd' (fun k hk hkm ↦ ?_)
    have h1 : 2 ^ f n ≡ 4 [MOD k] :=
      (Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.coprime_two_left.2 (hP_odd n))).mul_right 4
      |> (Nat.ModEq.of_dvd hkm)
      |> (by simpa [pow_add, bit0, bit1] using ·)
    have h2 : 2 ^ f n ≡ 3 [MOD k] := by
      have : 2 ^ f n = (2 ^ f n - 3) + 3 := Nat.sub_add_cancel (by linarith [h_val_gt_one n])
      rw [this]
      refine Nat.ModEq.add ?_ rfl
      rw [Nat.modEq_zero_iff_dvd]; exact hk
    have : 1 ≡ 0 [MOD k] := by
      convert h2.symm.trans h1 using 1
      rw [show 4 = 3 + 1 by rfl]; exact (Nat.modEq_add_left 3).symm
    exact Nat.dvd_one.mp (Nat.modEq_zero_iff_dvd.mp this.symm)
  have h_dvd (i j : ℕ) (h : i < j) : 2 ^ f i - 3 ∣ P j := by
    induction j with | zero => contradiction | succ j ih =>
    rcases Nat.lt_or_eq_or_lt i j with h' | rfl | h'
    · simp [P]; exact Nat.dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (ih h') _
    · simp [P]
    · linarith
  refine ⟨Set.range f, Set.infinite_range_of_injective f (fun i j h ↦ ?_), ?_⟩
  · rcases Nat.lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_lt
    · have := Nat.coprime_divisors_disjoint (h_dvd i j h_lt) (h_cop j) (Nat.dvd_refl _)
      rw [h, Nat.isUnit_iff] at this; linarith [h_val_gt_one i]
    · rfl
    · have := Nat.coprime_divisors_disjoint (h_dvd j i h_lt) (h_cop i) (Nat.dvd_refl _)
      rw [h, Nat.isUnit_iff] at this; linarith [h_val_gt_one j]
  · rintro _ ⟨i, rfl⟩ _ ⟨j, rfl⟩ ne
    rcases Nat.lt_or_gt_of_ne ne with h | h
    · exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (h_dvd i j h) (h_cop j)
    · exact Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left (h_dvd j i h) (h_cop i)

let step (np : ℕ × ℕ) : ℕ × ℕ :=
    let (n, p) := np
    let n' := (n + 1) * p.totient + 2
    (n', p * (2 ^ n' - 3))
  let seq (k : ℕ) := (step^[k] (3, 5)).1
  let prod (k : ℕ) := (step^[k] (3, 5)).2
  have h_step : ∀ k, seq (k + 1) = (seq k + 1) * (prod k).totient + 2 := fun k ↦ rfl
  have h_vals : ∀ k, 5 ≤ prod k ∧ (∀ i ≤ k, 2 ^ seq i - 3 ∣ prod k) ∧ Odd (prod k) := by
    intro k
    induction k with
    | zero => simp [prod, seq]; norm_num
    | succ k ih =>
      obtain ⟨h1, h2, h3⟩ := ih
      have h_seq_pos : 3 ≤ seq (k + 1) := by 
        rw [h_step]; have := Nat.totient_pos (by linarith); linarith
      simp [prod, step]
      refine ⟨?, ?, ?⟩
      · calc 5 ≤ prod k * 1 := by rw [mul_one]; exact h1
          _ ≤ prod k * (2 ^ seq (k+1) - 3) := by
            gcongr; apply Nat.sub_le_sub_right; apply Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (by norm_num)
      · intro i hi
        rw [Nat.le_succ_iff_eq_or_le] at hi
        rcases hi with rfl | hi
        · exact dvd_mul_left _ _
        · exact dvd_mul_of_dvd_left (h2 i hi) _
      · apply Nat.Odd.mul h3
        rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even]
        intro h
        rw [Nat.even_sub] at h
        · rw [Nat.even_two_pow (by linarith)] at h; simp at h
        · apply Nat.le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.one_le_two_pow _)
  have h_mono : StrictMono seq := by
    apply strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ
    intro k
    rw [h_step]
    have : 1 ≤ (prod k).totient := Nat.totient_pos (by linarith [(h_vals k).1])
    linarith
  refine ⟨Set.range (fun k ↦ ⟨seq k, by linarith [h_mono.le_at_nat k]⟩), ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [Set.infinite_range_iff]; exact h_mono.injective
  · rintro _ _ ⟨i, rfl⟩ ⟨j, rfl⟩ h_ne
    wlog h_lt : i < j generalizing i j
    · exact (this j i (Ne.symm h_ne) (Ne.symm h_ne)).symm
    have h_mod : 2 ^ seq j ≡ 4 [MOD prod (j-1)] := by
      have hj : j = (j-1) + 1 := (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (by omega)).symm
      rw [hj, h_step]
      have hc : Nat.Coprime 2 (prod (j-1)) := by
         rw [Nat.coprime_comm, Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd]
         exact Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mp (h_vals (j-1)).2.2
      rw [pow_add, pow_mul, Nat.ModEq.pow_totient hc]; rfl
    have h_gcd : (2 ^ seq j - 3).Coprime (prod (j-1)) := by
      rw [Nat.coprime_comm, Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
      have : 2 ^ seq j - 3 = (2 ^ seq j / prod (j-1)) * prod (j-1) + 1 := by
         rw [Nat.eq_add_of_sub_eq (by apply Nat.le_trans _ (Nat.one_le_two_pow _); norm_num) rfl]
         rw [←Nat.div_add_mod (2^seq j) (prod (j-1))]
         rw [h_mod] 
         rfl
      rw [this, Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.gcd_mul_right_add_right, Nat.gcd_one_right]
    apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right (h_vals (j-1)).2.1 i (by omega) h_gcd

let P : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 (fun _ x ↦ x * (2 ^ (x.totient + 2) - 3))
  have h_odd : ∀ k, Odd (P k) := by
    intro k; induction k with
    | zero => exact odd_one
    | succ k ih =>
      rw [Nat.rec_add_one, Nat.mul_comm]
      refine Odd.mul ?_ ih
      use 2 ^ (P k).totient * 2 - 2
      rw [Nat.pow_add, Nat.pow_two, mul_assoc, ← Nat.mul_sub_right_distrib]
      rfl
  let n (k : ℕ) : ℕ+ := ⟨(P k).totient + 2, by linarith [Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_odd (h_odd k))]⟩
  have h_coprime : Pairwise fun i j ↦ (2 ^ (n i : ℕ) - 3).Coprime (2 ^ (n j : ℕ) - 3) := by
    intros i j h_ne
    wlog h_lt : i < j generalizing i j
    · exact (this j i h_ne.symm (h_ne.symm.lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_not_lt h_lt))).symm
    have h_dvd : P i ∣ P j := by
      refine Nat.le_induction (dvd_refl _) (fun k _ h ↦ dvd_trans h ?_) j (Nat.le_of_lt h_lt)
      rw [Nat.rec_add_one]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
    apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left h_dvd
    have h_mod : 2 ^ (n j : ℕ) ≡ 4 [MOD P j] := by
      dsimp [n]; rw [Nat.pow_add, Nat.pow_two]
      exact Nat.ModEq.mul (Nat.ModEq.pow_totient (Nat.coprime_two_left.2 (h_odd j))) rfl
    have h_mod' : 2 ^ (n j : ℕ) - 3 ≡ 1 [MOD P j] := by
      convert Nat.ModEq.sub_right rfl h_mod
    exact (Nat.ModEq.symm h_mod').coprime_eq_one Nat.coprime_one_left
  refine ⟨Set.range n, Set.infinite_range_of_injective fun i j h_eq ↦ ?_, ?_⟩
  · by_contra h_nij
    have hc := h_coprime i j h_nij
    rw [h_eq] at hc
    apply Nat.not_coprime_self (2 ^ (n j : ℕ) - 3) hc
    apply Nat.ne_of_gt
    simp only [n]; have := h_odd j; linarith [Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_odd this)]
  · rintro _ _ ⟨i, rfl⟩ ⟨j, rfl⟩ h_diff
    exact h_coprime i j (fun h ↦ h_diff (congr_arg n h))

let next (l : List ℕ) := (l.map (fun x => 2^x - 3)).prod.totient + 2
  let L := Nat.rec [] fun _ l ↦ l ++ [next l]
  let f n := (L (n + 1)).getLast (by simp [L])
  have hL n : L n = (List.range n).map f := by
    induction n <;> simp [L, *, f, List.getLast_append]
  have hf n : f n = next ((List.range n).map f) := by rw [f, hL, L]; simp
  have h3 n : 3 ≤ f n := by
    rw [hf]; apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Nat.totient_pos.2; apply List.prod_pos; intro x hx
    obtain ⟨i, _, rfl⟩ := List.mem_map.1 hx
    exact Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide) (pow_le_pow_right (by decide) (h3 i)))
  have hcop {m n} (h : m < n) : (2 ^ f n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ f m - 3) := by
    rw [hf n, next]; set P := _
    have d : 2 ^ f m - 3 ∣ P := List.dvd_prod (List.mem_map_of_mem _ (List.mem_range.2 h))
    refine (Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right d).2 (Nat.modeq_one_iff_coprime.1 ?_)
    have hP : 4 < P := by
      refine lt_of_le_of_lt (by decide) (List.le_prod (List.mem_map_of_mem _ (List.mem_range.2 h)) ?_)
      exact le_trans (by decide) (Nat.sub_le_sub_right (pow_le_pow_right (by decide) (h3 m)) _)
    have : 2 ^ P.totient ≡ 1 [MOD P] := Nat.ModEq.pow_totient <| Nat.coprime_list_prod_right fun x hx ↦ by
       obtain ⟨i, _, rfl⟩ := List.mem_map.1 hx
       rw [Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd, Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, ←Nat.odd_iff,
           ←Nat.even_iff_not_odd, Nat.even_sub (pow_le_pow_right (by decide) (h3 i)),
           Nat.even_pow]; simp [h3 i]; decide
    rw [pow_add, show 2^2 = 4 by rfl, mul_comm]
    exact (this.mul_left 4).sub (Nat.ModEq.refl 3)
  refine ⟨Set.range fun n ↦ ⟨f n, Nat.zero_lt_one.trans_le (h3 n)⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.Infinite.of_injective _ (fun n m e ↦ by
      wlog h : n < m; · exact Nat.le_antisymm (not_lt.1 h) (not_lt.1 (this m n e.symm))
      have := hcop h; rw [Subtype.ext_iff.1 e] at this; simp at this; contradiction)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩ ne; apply Nat.Coprime.symm
    cases Nat.lt_or_gt_of_ne (mt (congr_arg _) ne) with
    | inl h => exact hcop h
    | inr h => exact (hcop h).symm

let P := Nat.rec 5 (fun _ x ↦ x * (2 ^ x.totient - 3))
  have hP_ge_5 : ∀ n, 5 ≤ P n := by
    intro n; induction n with
    | zero => exact le_rfl
    | succ n ih =>
      refine le_trans ih (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_right _ ?_)
      apply Nat.sub_pos_of_lt
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt (by norm_num) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (Nat.totient_ge_two (le_trans (by norm_num) ih)))
  let f : ℕ → ℕ+ := fun n ↦ match n with
      | 0 => ⟨3, by simp⟩
      | n + 1 => ⟨(P n).totient, Nat.totient_pos (by linarith [hP_ge_5 n])⟩
  let val (n : ℕ) := 2 ^ (f n).val - 3
  have h_val_ge_5 : ∀ n, val n ≥ 5 := by
    intro n; cases n <;> dsimp [val, f]
    · norm_num
    · apply Nat.le_sub_of_add_le; norm_num
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num)
      apply Nat.totient_ge_two (le_trans (by norm_num) (hP_ge_5 _))
  have h_odd : ∀ n, Odd (P n) := by
    intro n; induction n with
    | zero => exact ⟨2, rfl⟩
    | succ n ih => 
      rw [Nat.rec_add_one, Nat.odd_mul]; refine ⟨ih, ?_⟩
      rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub (Nat.le_trans (by norm_num) (h_val_ge_5 (n+1)))]
      simp [Nat.even_pow]; push_neg
      refine ⟨by norm_num, Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp (Nat.totient_pos (by linarith [hP_ge_5 n]))⟩
  have h_prod : ∀ n, P n = ∏ i in Finset.range (n + 1), val i := by
    intro n; induction n with
    | zero => simp [P, val, f]
    | succ n ih => rw [Nat.rec_add_one, ih, Finset.prod_range_succ]; rfl
  have h_coprime : ∀ n, Nat.Coprime (val (n + 1)) (P n) := by
    intro n; dsimp [val, f]
    rw [Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one, ← Int.gcd_natCast_natCast]
    have h_cast : ((2 ^ (P n).totient - 3 : ℕ) : ℤ) = (2 ^ (P n).totient : ℤ) - 3 := 
      Int.ofNat_sub (le_trans (by norm_num) (Nat.le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (by norm_num) (h_val_ge_5 (n+1)))))
    rw [h_cast, Int.gcd_eq_gcd_mod, show ((2 ^ (P n).totient : ℤ) - 3) % (P n) = -2 % (P n) from ?_]
    · rw [← Int.gcd_eq_gcd_mod, Int.gcd_neg, Int.gcd_comm, Int.gcd_eq_one_iff_coprime, Int.coprime_iff_nat_coprime]
      exact Nat.coprime_two_left_of_odd (h_odd n)
    · apply Int.ModEq.sub_right
      rw [← Int.ModEq, Int.ModEq.of_nat_iff]
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient
      exact Nat.coprime_two_left_of_odd (h_odd n)
  refine ⟨Set.range f, ?_, ?_⟩
  · apply Set.infinite_range_of_injective
    intro n m h
    wlog hnm : n < m generalizing n m
    · rcases lt_or_eq_or_gt n m with h' | h' | h'
      · exact hnm n m h h'
      · exact h'
      · symm; exact hnm m n h.symm h'
    · have hc := h_coprime (m - 1)
      rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_of_lt hnm)] at hc
      have hd : val n ∣ P (m - 1) := by
        rw [h_prod]; apply Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem
        rw [Finset.mem_range]; exact Nat.lt_of_succ_le (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hnm)
      have h_cp : Nat.Coprime (val m) (val n) := Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right hd hc
      rw [h] at h_cp; simp at h_cp
      linarith [h_val_ge_5 m]
  · intro a b ha hb hab
    rcases ha with ⟨n, rfl⟩; rcases hb with ⟨m, rfl⟩
    wlog hnm : n < m generalizing n m
    · cases lt_or_gt_of_ne (by intro h; apply hab; rw [h]) with
      | inl h => exact hnm n m hab h
      | inr h => apply Nat.Coprime.symm; exact hnm m n hab.symm h
    have hc := h_coprime (m - 1)
    rw [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_of_lt hnm)] at hc
    apply Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_right _ hc
    rw [h_prod]; apply Finset.dvd_prod_of_mem
    rw [Finset.mem_range]; exact Nat.lt_of_succ_le (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hnm)

let p : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 (λ _ x ↦ x * (2 ^ (x.totient + 2) - 3))
  let f : ℕ → ℕ+ := λ k ↦ ⟨(p k).totient + 2, Nat.add_pos_right _ (by decide)⟩
  have h_cop (k : ℕ) : ((2 : ℕ) ^ (f k : ℕ) - 3).Coprime (p k) := by
    have h_odd : ¬ 2 ∣ p k := by
      induction k <;> simp [p, *]
      intro h; rcases Nat.Prime.dvd_mul Nat.prime_two h with h | h
      · contradiction
      · have : 3 ≤ (2 : ℕ) ^ (f k : ℕ) :=
          (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (Nat.le_add_left 2 _))
        have : 2 ∣ (2 : ℕ) ^ (f k : ℕ) := ⟨2 ^ ((f k : ℕ) - 1), by
          rw [← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.le_add_left 1 _)]⟩
        have : 2 ∣ 3 := (Nat.dvd_sub_iff_right this).mp h
        contradiction
    have : 2 ^ (f k : ℕ) ≡ 4 [MOD p k] := by
      rw [show (f k : ℕ) = (p k).totient + 2 from rfl, pow_add, show 2^2=4 from rfl, mul_comm]
      apply Nat.ModEq.mul_right
      apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient
      rw [Nat.coprime_comm]; exact Nat.coprime_two_right.mpr h_odd
    rw [Nat.coprime_comm, Nat.coprime_iff_gcd_eq_one]
    refine Nat.dvd_one.1 (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_sub_left ?_ _) ?_)
    · exact (Nat.ModEq.add_right 3 this).symm
    · simp [Nat.add_sub_cancel]; apply Nat.gcd_one_left
  have h_dvd (n m : ℕ) (h : n < m) : (2 : ℕ) ^ (f n : ℕ) - 3 ∣ p m := by
    induction m, h using Nat.le_induction with
    | base => simp [p]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right
    | succ m _ ih => simp [p]; apply Nat.dvd_trans ih (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _)
  refine ⟨Set.range f, Set.infinite_range_of_injective (λ n m h ↦ ?_), ?_⟩
  · by_contra ne
    wlog hlt : n < m generalizing n m
    · exact this m n h.symm ne.symm (ne.lt_or_lt.resolve_left hlt)
    have : (2 : ℕ) ^ (f n : ℕ) - 3 = 1 :=
      Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_coprimes (h_cop m) (h ▸ h_dvd n m hlt) (Nat.dvd_refl _)
    linarith [Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide : 0 < 2) (Nat.le_add_left 2 (p n).totient)]
  · rw [Set.pairwise_range]
    intro n m hne
    wlog hlt : n < m generalizing n m
    · exact (this m n hne.symm (hne.lt_or_lt.resolve_left hlt)).symm
    exact ((h_cop m).coprime_dvd_right (h_dvd n m hlt)).symm

let seq := Nat.rec 3 (fun _ x ↦ (2^x - 3)!)
  have h_ge_3 : ∀ n, 3 ≤ seq n := by
    intro n; induction n with
    | zero => exact le_rfl
    | succ n ih =>
      dsimp [seq]
      apply le_trans (show 3 ≤ 120 by norm_num)
      apply Nat.factorial_le_factorial
      apply le_trans (show 5 ≤ 2^3 - 3 by norm_num)
      apply Nat.sub_le_sub_right
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) ih
  have h_mono : StrictMono seq := by
    apply strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ
    intro n; dsimp [seq]
    have h3 : 3 ≤ seq n := h_ge_3 n
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le _ (Nat.self_le_factorial _)
    apply Nat.lt_sub_of_add_lt
    induction h3 using Nat.le_induction with
    | base => norm_num
    | succ k hk ih => rw [pow_succ, two_mul]; linarith
  let s : Set ℕ+ := { ⟨seq n, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by linarith [h_ge_3 n])⟩ | n : ℕ }
  refine ⟨s, Set.infinite_range_of_injective h_mono.injective, ?_⟩
  rw [Set.Pairwise]
  rintro ⟨_, _⟩ ⟨_, _⟩ ⟨m, rfl⟩ ⟨n, rfl⟩ hne
  dsimp only at hne; simp at hne
  wlog h_lt : m < n generalizing m n
  · exact (this n m hne.symm (hne.symm.lt_of_le (Nat.le_of_not_lt h_lt))).symm
  let A := 2 ^ seq m - 3
  let B := 2 ^ seq n - 3
  have hA_pos : 0 < A := by dsimp [A]; linarith [h_ge_3 m]
  have hA_odd : Odd A := by
    rw [Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.even_sub]
    · simp; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge_3 m)
    · apply le_trans (show 5 ≤ 2^3 - 3 by norm_num)
      apply Nat.sub_le_sub_right
      apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by norm_num) (h_ge_3 m)
  have h_div : A! ∣ seq n := by
    have : ∀ k, m < k → seq (m+1) ∣ seq k := by
      intro k hk
      induction k, hk using Nat.le_induction with
      | base => exact dvd_rfl
      | succ k _ ih =>
        apply dvd_trans ih
        dsimp [seq]; apply Nat.dvd_factorial
        apply le_trans (h_ge_3 k) (le_of_lt (h_mono.lt_succ k))
    exact dvd_trans (dvd_trans (dvd_refl _) (this n h_lt)) (by dsimp [seq]; exact dvd_rfl)
  have h_euler : 2 ^ seq n ≡ 1 [MOD A] := by
    apply Nat.ModEq.pow_totient
    · rw [Nat.coprime_comm]; exact Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr hA_odd
    · refine dvd_trans (Nat.dvd_factorial (Nat.totient_pos hA_pos) ?_) h_div
      apply le_of_lt; apply Nat.totient_lt_self_of_one_lt; linarith
  refine Nat.dvd_one.mp (Nat.dvd_gcd (Nat.gcd_dvd_left A B) ?_)
  have : A.gcd B ∣ 2 := by
    convert Nat.dvd_sub' (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left A B) (Nat.modeq_iff_dvd.mp h_euler.symm)) (Nat.gcd_dvd_right A B)
    dsimp [B]; apply Nat.sub_le_sub_left (show 1 ≤ 3 by norm_num)
  exact Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_two_of_odd this (Nat.Odd.of_dvd_nat hA_odd (Nat.gcd_dvd_left A B))

let P : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec 1 (fun n pn => pn * (2 ^ ((n + 3) * pn.totient) - 3))
  have hP_odd : ∀ n, (P n) % 2 = 1 := by
    intro n; induction n <;> simp [P, *, Nat.mul_mod, Nat.pow_mod, Nat.sub_mod_of_le (Nat.le_self_pow (by simp) _)]
  let f : ℕ → ℕ+ := fun n => ⟨(n + 3) * (P n).totient, by
    refine Nat.succ_le_of_lt (Nat.mul_pos (Nat.add_pos_right _ (by decide)) (Nat.totient_pos (Nat.pos_of_odd_iff.2 (hP_odd n))))⟩
  have h_coprime : ∀ n m, n < m → Nat.Coprime (2 ^ (f n).val - 3) (2 ^ (f m).val - 3) := by
    intro n m h
    let d := 2 ^ (f n).val - 3
    have hdiv : d ∣ P m := by
      refine Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _) ?_
      induction m, h using Nat.le_induction <;> simp [P, *]
      exact Nat.dvd_trans (by assumption) (Nat.dvd_mul_right _ _)
    have hmod : 2 ^ (f m).val ≡ 1 [MOD P m] := 
      Nat.ModEq.pow_totient_dvd _ (Nat.dvd_mul_left _ _) (Nat.Coprime.symm (Nat.prime_two.coprime_iff_not_dvd.2 (by rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero, hP_odd m]; decide)))
    refine Nat.eq_one_of_dvd_one (Nat.dvd_trans (Nat.gcd_dvd_left _ _) ?_)
    rw [← Nat.dvd_add_iff_left (Nat.dvd_sub' (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow (by simp) (by simp))) (Nat.ModEq.modeq_zero_iff.1 (hmod.of_dvd hdiv)))]
    norm_num; apply Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero
    rw [Nat.sub_mod_of_le (Nat.le_self_pow (by simp) _), Nat.pow_mod]; simp
  refine ⟨Set.range f, Set.infinite_range_of_injective (fun n m heq ↦ ?_), ?_⟩
  · wlog h : n < m generalizing n m
    · exact (this m n heq.symm h).symm
    specialize h_coprime n m h
    rw [heq] at h_coprime
    simp at h_coprime
    have : 2 ^ (f m).val - 3 ≥ 5 := Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (by simp; apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (Nat.le_trans (by decide) (f m).2))
    linarith
  · intro a b ⟨n, rfl⟩ ⟨m, rfl⟩ hab
    cases Nat.lt_or_gt_of_ne (mt (congr_arg f) hab) with
    | inl h => exact h_coprime n m h
    | inr h => exact (h_coprime m n h).symm
